blonde kat von d brow powder (kvd - vegan). excellent color for those of us with light blonde hair. the slight golden shimmer is enchanting. stays on my eyebrows 6-8 hours. i appreciate cruelty-free products. i will definitely purchase again.

burned. this gel burned my face within a minute. i dont have sensitive skin and i have used all different types of products including peels. this burn is so hot, it will likely take a while to heal.i would say shame on me for not patch testing but ive never had to with anything. learned a lesson today.
great assortment for a great price. needed some hair bands for my short hair style and purchased these headbands. they stay in place and tend to not bother me as much as some other headbands.

i am so pleased with the way this mask has made my skin .... i've only had this product for a little while, so i can't attest to any long term efects. but from my experience, i am so pleased with the way this mask has made my skin feel. it's made my skin incredibly soft and even felt a little "plumped". the old saying about 'soft as a baby's bottom" was the first thing i thought of that could describe it. it's easy to use, makes my face feel wonderful and easy to integrate into my skin care routine. i recommend this product because it makes my skin feel "dewy" and truely pampered! 5 stars!!
beautiful rose. beautiful it clipped and pinned to my hat perfectly .
really good soap.. these smell really nice, are well foaming and silky smooth. love them.

no crease but slip out. i'm only giving 4 stars because although these ties are true to their name - they really do not crease your hair - unless you wrap them around your ponytail three times, they slip down. so you are faced with the choice of having a comfortably loose ponytail (2 wraps) or a tight but secure one (3 wraps). i still use them but don't recommend them for golf or any athletic activity.

the best.. i hate typical air fresheners that smell so fake and have who-knows-what kind of crap in them. we use this in the room that has our cats' litter boxes in it, and spritz a couple times after scooping. it takes care of the smell right away, and lasts a long time!
loose bristles at first. bristles fall out into mouth first few uses. once that is over theyre fine.

cute as can be & high quality. i absolutely love these headbands. finally something that stays on my round head with baby fine hair. i use them every night will applying my skin care system.they are beautiful and very well made

well made barrette. really nice barrette! it's a bit of a tight squeeze for shoulder length, medium thick hair but once i figured it out, it fits perfectly. i'm thinking of buying the other color now.
five stars. gave this as a gift and my friend loved it! especially getting two!! would buy again :)

great product. good color and coverage. sharpens perfectly. good match for paler blondes. i've used rimmel hazel in the past, this is better. more of a true ash blonde and not as dark.however, to save money, buy it from the essence company online. they cost $1.99 each and if you order $15 of product delivery is free. fast shipping too
arrived smashed to pieces. was completely unusable, smashed and leaking.
feels light but moisturizing. love the sheer color and the softness - would definitely order again
good chair wish i had bought it sooner. super comfy and bigger than i was expecting. easy assembly- looks good.

great stuff!. finally, something that you leave in your hair that works. i have silver hair, but use a gradual color darkening product which overtime, can dry my hair out a bit. this leave in conditioner really makes my hair soft, shiny and smells wonderful (not perfumey). the next day, it looks even better!

well, the color is pretty.... i'm one of the unfortunate ones who actually had to pay for these. most of the reviews (close to practically all) were from people who received a complementary set, in exchange for their honest opinion. i'm not sure if i'm using the same product as all the rest of those 5 star reviewers, but these do absolutely zero/zilch. ok, the rose water or whatever they're packed in smells nice, and they feel ok on your eyes, but so does a cheap ice mask, which gives better temporary results...not to mention, positioning these super thin, slimy gizmos is a pain in the butt. eventually, you'll get them to stick and assume all that work will pay off. i have bags under my eyes, and after using these five times (every other day) there's not even a 0.1% difference. i even tried them first thing in the morning when my eyes were at their worst. this is the placebo effect at its best!

holy crap this stuff is so pigmented be careful pumping it .... holy crap this stuff is so pigmented be careful pumping it out you do not need a lot and do not use your hand to pump on as it will stain your skin. get a styrofoam plate or use a counter then windex or bleach after. very very pigmented very beautiful.

my secret weapon to love on my skin. i was using rose water witchhazel for many years. then i got this to try out. one is to cleanse. this one is to definitely lock in moisture with healing properties. this is wonderful to use at anytime. my favorite is after splashing my face with water to help lock in natural elements. i recommend for anyone with sensitive skin and/ or aging skin.
nice. i have medium thick hair and these work well. i particularly love the red (which are hard to find) and the teal color. pale pink is an interesting color also. these are normal, good quality.
excellent. feels stronger than itworks wraps and is way cheaper. first wrap is on now so we will see! feels like it's working!
buen precio y producto calidad. buen producto .precio accesible .la calidad del producto es buena y efectiva
good for the price. loved the color. a lot got tangled but i still hand enough to do my whole head so im happy.
looks good with red hair. big sunflower clip; stays put in my hair. looks good with red hair.
its okay.... hard to straighten the roots and takes too many passes for it to actually be straight. i have curly, thick, coarse hair, so it doesnt work that well, even on high heat.
decent files. they do what they're supposed to do.

not a shaving brush. the description says shaving brush and that's why i bought it. but the brush box says its a beard brush. so, i still tried using it as a shaving brush. big mistake. it was like using a pot & pan scrub brush. i couldn't raise up a lather it's so stiff. but it did a nice job exfoliating my face.badger? don't think so. i have many real badger brushes. this appears to be horse or boar. there might be some goat mixed in, who knows for sure?
super cute. if you have multiple kids or travel a lot, these covers are excellent. well made and very cute. i personally like the dog.easy to clean and well made.

leaves a film, expensive. it's gentle and cleanses well but i notice that it left a thin slippery residue that cannot be washed off easily. if you have a clarisonic though it could help get rid of this problem. if not, maybe use a washcloth after rinsing.

nice set. "jeff's wife" - i got these when they were an add-on item for $3.99, definitely worth the price. the stamper works great, i didn't even wash it first (even though you should always wash new stampers before first use), and it's slightly (i do mean slightly) softer then other clear stampers i own.if you're new to stamping or not familiar with clear stampers, they are more delicate than opaque ones and tear easily, so be gentle with it. wash it with dish soap & warm water, dry with a paper towel and clean it with a lint roller or tape. never buff it or use acetone, you'll make it cloudy defeating the purpose of a clear stamper. when picking up, roll gently over the image if you apply too much pressure it won't pick up. when applying the image to the nail press straight down (again, with gentle pressure) and rock side to side or roll from side to side. don't push the tip of the nail into it, it will tear.all the plates stamp great, i didn't swatch every image, although plates 29 & 41 have shallow etching (in my experience this is normal for bp plates) so the thinner scraper is a nice addition. it's not as thin as the 0.5mm and not a thick as the 1mm ones i own, i'd say it's 0.75mm (i didn't get out the calipers). there are different size images, a little for every nail size. but i do wish the water marble designs were bigger, i'm not a water marble witch yet. plate 52 is great for lead lighting or sharpie water coloring.the stamping guide works like it's supposed to, i've added a photo to show how it's used just in case it's confusing. i have a set of 4 templates from another brand already, there's not much difference in size or thickness of the metal but the designs are different. the edges aren't finished, like a plate with no backing, but i don't think it would cause anyone to slice their finger open unless you're being extremely careless.all in all a great set.

good for nail art. "jeff's wife" - this is not true to color, it dries quite a bit darker, as you can see from the pic, but since i only use it for nail art i don't care but some of you might. i bought the pink back in feb. 2015, still using it just got tired of the color, and this one seems slightly less opaque but maybe it's because that one is pink on pale skin but a second coat fixes the opacity, (only 1 coat in the pic). it may leave a few specks of the shimmer on your skin when you peel it off but they wipe away effortlessly.if you're new to nail art and want to use this for that, i do suggest you transfer some to an empty polish bottle (cleaned with acetone or brand new doesn't matter) using a syringe with some sort of tip, an eye dropper or even a straw, this will keep the large bottle from drying out. this 4 oz bottle will last you a very long time, i still have about half the bottle i bought in feb. 2015, and costs a fraction of the price as those other brands marketed specifically for nail art.

another great set of images!. "jeff's wife"- great plates and images that stamp beautifully, as always from cici & sisi. i do have two issues. one is that four of the six sleeves are cracked in the corners, like it's old, dried out plastic but i guess it's nothing that some packing tape can't fix. i've never had this issue with the other five sets from them. the other issue is the holder feels a bit more foam like instead of the pleather like the previous ones. but those issues have absolutely nothing to do the stamping ability of the images which, in the end, is the most important thing!

love this stuff!. this is my first time using plain silk wrap and i love it! i started using the self adhesive silk tabs to fix cracks and they worked great so i wrapped all my nails but i had to keep buying them. so i upgraded to this. i'm so glad i did. yes it takes longer to do my nails now but it's so totally worth it. i wrap my nails every week or so and there's still so much of it left! i will not buy anything else, ever!
you either love it or hate it. if you like bay rum, then you'll like florida water. if you don't like bay rum after a hot shave then something is wrong with you. turn in your man card immediately.

love all of the patterns and they fit perfectly!. i didn't see any reviews for these headbands and took a chance. i absolutely love each and every pattern that is in this set. nothing too crazy, but just enough to add a little extra to an outfit. would highly recommend these.
easy to use, inside & out on my teeth.. cleaning plaque & flossing.

great discovery set. i discovered this brand through my ipsy bag, and was excited to try a few more best sellers from this brand. i personally love the vitamin c serum and the moisture boost cream. the squalene oil is great to mix with foundations that are a bit too drying without disturbing the coverage level or texture. overall, great set.

more of an oil. this is more of an oil than a serum in my opinion. it does absorb immediately and does not smell strong like many vitamin c serums. it smells very light and fresh with the slightest citrus scent to it. great to use for both day and night. does not contain a sunscreen, so make sure to use one during the day. overall, highly recommended.

great moisturizing cleansing balm. i have used the farmacy cleansing balm for 3 years and this is the first time i have used another brand. i find this balm very hydrating. it removes waterproof makeup very well, has a very fresh scent and with a bit of water turns into a milky cleanser. it also comes with a scoop for sanitary use. overall, it is a great cleansing balm at a reasonable price. highly recommended.

great nail files. these are very good nail files. they work very well, and lasts through multiple uses. i have natural nails, and i i find that the two different grits work well with smoothing edges and removing sharp corners of nails after trimming. i was replacing my old files after every use and the sand was flaking off and getting all over my floors. i did not have any problems with these doing that. overall, it's a very high quality product and i would highly recommend it, especially for professional use.

super convenient, great for travel.. these are perfect for on the go and travel. don't leak and the pads are nicely saturated. great to keep in makeup bags or even as a stocking stuffer. i don't use perfume everyday, so these last me a while. nice way to try out a fragrance before committing to a full sized bottle as well. highly recommended.

easy hair styling accessory. this makes hair styling very easy. looks professional, and comfortable for all day wear. the band itself is kinda fragile so you have to be careful not to bend it too far apart or it might snap. overall, it's a good product.

great face masks!. these are real korean face masks from a great brand. i first discovered this brand from a subscription box and am now hooked. the box contains 10 masks and each are individually wrapped. they have a generous amount of serum in each. great as a weekend treat at home after a bath. overall, highly recommended!

silly but fun. this set of scrunchies and sunglasses for a bride and her bridesmaids is silly but fun. the scrunchies are made of a nice satin type fabric. the sunglasses don't actually offer much sun protection, but they are cute.

has some sparkle. overall, i like this powder and feel it is a good product. i have pale skin that can look sallow at times. i like the pink tone to the shade that i got. the powder is easy to apply with the small puff included, but i prefer to use a soft applicator brush. this powder does have a bit of sparkle in it, which i don't always want, but it adds a nice glow for nighttime use.

interesting.... i wasn't really sure what dermaplaning involved before i ordered this product. i watched a couple of youtube clips and decided to give it a try. these tools are bladed scrapers that are used to gently scrape away dead skin and tiny hairs to give your face a fresh, clean, healthy look. in the videos i watched, there was a considerable amount of icky skin removed- literally piles of it! my experience has been much less dramatic. a whole face application resulted in just a tiny amount of "dust" to be removed. i applied a bit too much pressure at first and gave myself a little scratch, so do be cautious. these blades are sharp!i feel that my skin does look brighter and more healthy. those videos of dermaplaning likely feature models who had been tanning and not washing their faces so the dirt and oil really built up, and skin was ready to peel.this product removes tiny "peach fuzz" hairs but i also tried it on a small patch of coarser leg hair that i had missed while shaving. it took it off neatly with no irritation.
go multi purpose balm. takes me back to childhood. i basically used this in lieu of a vapor rub. it really clears the sinuses. and the tingle feels great on achy spots.

rubbing alcohol burns eyes. this stuff smells like hand sanitizer. it smells like straight rubbing alcohol and has a strange texture where it balls up when you rub it in. when i got to apply it to my sons face he yells that it hurts his eyes, and i tried it too and it's like rubbing alcohol is just evaporating into your eyes. if you do get this use it on arms and legs, then get a separate one for faces. that's kind of a hassle though so i'd just nix it all together and get a kid one that doesn't burn their eyes.i was also disappointed that it doesn't go on blue and fade. there's really no way to see where it's applied unless it does that weird crumbly thing, in which case i'm not sure if it's spreading onto the skin or just clumping up.

the applicator is hard and makes the mascara feel dried out. i have short, stubby lashes so i was excited to try this. i ended up being pretty disappointed. at first, i thought the mascara was dried out because it looked like there was nothing on the brush. i have dark lashes so i couldn't see anything go on color-wise. i rubbed my hand on the brush and there was mascara on there, it just really did not thicken or lengthen at all. the bristles are also molded plastic, so they are scratchy and do not work well at distributing product. it's one of the worst designed mascara brushes i've seen. i thought it was old and dried up that's how bad it was. i will not be using or purchasing this mascara again.

luxurious body cream! pure ingredients!. prairie rose organics mint cocoa velvet body cream is just that - thick, rich & creamy. seeps into my skin to create a moisture barrier and the scent is heavenly! this has a very true, pure blend of cocoa and peppermint. this will make a beautiful gift!

all natural multi-use bath set works great!. i've already used them all and they work well and feel good on my skin! the set comes with four pieces and a handle. the tools are all made of natural materials: shower bath brush, body massager, dry brush/pumice stone & loofah. the natural boar bristles bath brush is terrific - i can reach everywhere and it feels great on my back. i really jammed the handle on tightly and it didn't come off the brush while i was using it in the shower. yet, i was able to remove it when i wanted to attach the massager. these can be used with just the attached handle strap, too. the loofah and pumice stone work great on my feet. good quality, and i love the way they are packaged to make a nice gift box!

large bars of soap! invigorating sage!. my favorite soap!this smells heavenly! i'll get a whiff of sage while reading in my bedroom, even though the bars of soap are in a nearby bathroom. and it is delightful -- like the great outdoors! invigorating.i'm using this in the shower as a body scrubber -- it's abrasive, with bits of sage in the soap.it may seem a bit pricey, but these are large bars of soap.love, love, love pre' de provence!

this caused me to breakout more. i love how this product did give me a beautiful natural glow however, the cost of that flow caused my skin personally to break out. the same ingredients in the moisturizer and this spot corrector is what causes me to break out. so unfortunately this was returned.

best hair ties!!!. these are great!!! they have enough stretch to be useable but still tight enough to hold your hair and return to their shape. the colors are so beautiful! they really do leave no lines in your hair!!

hard to work with. gel was very hard to work with and the fiberglass sheets were so thick they wouldnt stay in a curve, they flattened out while curing the gel. also any gel on the nail side of the fiberglass sheet would not cure right. i dont know if this was because of the thickness of the sheets or what. bought these to mend a small split over the quick on my nail plate (instead of using acrylic like i usually do) to keep it together until it grew out and it did not work. wont be using these again.
love! i have terribly short lashes and this definitely .... love! i have terribly short lashes and this definitely built them up more than my typical layering of 3 mascaras.

super gentle. my skin is really sensitive.i also don't generally like all-in-one products. you should see my bathroom cabinets. trying to consolidate, but i get different rashes in different places, and no one thing works for everything.this is very gentle and did not make my skin or face or scalp break out or rash up at all. it's not super moisturizing, but it wasn't drying, either. the scent is very light, and the cleanser has a little minty/tingly kick. this would have worked for me in my teens or 20s when i couldn't wait to get out of the shower and on with my life.

good moisturizer. this is a good moisturizer and plumper for people whose skin is just starting to age. the plumpers are conventional ingredients, but nothing of major concern unless you are allergic.i did not get lasting results, but my skin is past just starting to age. i wish i'd had something like this at 40.

expensive machines. the nuderma wand has done a lot for my aging skin. there are a few creams and sera i swear by -> modern science is pretty cool. it used to be that anything topical just sat on your skin doing nothing (except the one with the french name and gazillion dollar price tag - which, btw, you can get much cheaper in the blue german tin plus seaweed serum). anyhoo - enter the era of home treatments. thermal machines are great if you have the money, and for less (but still not cheap) you can get these wands that are practically miraculous.used correctly and alongside good skincare practices, they can clear acne, minimize lines, and restore an awful lot of tone and some volume to aging skin. they don't work for everyone, but my skin is thin from prednisone use and it's aging, and the nuderma wand has been great at firming and plumping over time.mine came with the red wands, and i wanted to try the blue on my kid's pizza face. did i mention that these things zap you?yeah, that's important. they zap you. you want to get some numbing cream. anyway, he's never going to let me do this again, but it's too bad because it cleared his skin beautifully. and fast. and no giant pores from popping stuff. and because they are combination wands, i can use them on my skin.all for a very affordable amount.

rash. i'm bummed, because this seems to be working (eyelashes are way softer and less brittle), but it gave me a rash on my eyelids. i have lupus, and my skin is really sensitive, so this probably won't happen to you.

great for a beginner like me. this one is easy to use and results are great! i have it for a couple of months now. that is when i decided to do my own nails with gel. my sister-in-law recommended this machine because it was similar to the one that she has. it is not used much because i do my nails every 4-3 weeks. original drills are good for some applications, but i got a set of diamond drills for russian manicure. since then, i never had gel peeling off from the bottom (which was a common problem when i did my nails at the salon) because i clean my cuticles with this machine. i remove old gel with this machine as well. i am a very satisfied customer.

smells like salad dressing and feels like petroleum jelly. i didn't care much for this sleeping mask. it came in an unsealed box. there's a plastic cover under the lid, but there was a mess of cream all around the rim and threads. maybe it was used? it smells like lotion and salad dressing. it feels like vaseline on the skin, which is okay for a sleeping mask. it made me feel like it was certainly locking in moisture, but the next day, i didn't really notice anything different in my skin. i like sleeping masks but don't expect i would order this again. i definitely find it overpriced ($44) for the packaging, experience, and results - or lack thereof.

prefer the hydrating instant mask. i really like everyday beauty's hydrating instant mask so was hopeful for this night cream, but i wasn't as impressed. it didn't seem to leave my skin quite as velvety soft or last as many hours, yet the night cream is more expensive at $38/1 fl oz. the mask is $22/1.7 fl oz and can be used overnight as often as needed. i use it as the last step in my skincare routine. this cream came in a box, unsealed and simply smells like a cream.

gentle exfoliator. if you love strawberries and/or are seeking a gentle scrub, this is a good choice. the sealed tub also had a plastic cover under the the lid and was boxed. the scrub had a little brown in it like what you might see when fruit starts to rot or in yogurt, but it's dated good until 9/14/2023, so i felt okay using it. the red particles made my husband and i realize we didn't confidently know the color of strawberry seeds, but i think they are. they feel kind of squishy, and the scrub feels more like a creamy moisturizing lotion. it does smell like strawberries and makes skin soft. this is a different scrub that feels gentle. i personally prefer one that feels like it's polishing and cleaning more than moisturizing though. this is currently $12.

okay cleanser. the bottle came in a sealed box. it's a light pink gel. the scent is nice but more fruity-rose like you might find in products scented for children. it cleans okay. i don't feel it's worth $16, but i don't think i would buy this one again regardless.

dry rub. the tube had a foil seal. there is a pineapple scent. you're supposed to massage the gel on dry skin for 2 minutes. as soon as you start, it starts to pill. i feel like most of it immediately dries up and falls off though i'm sure it's grabbing dead skin too. while it's gentle in that it's not using coarse particles, i didn't enjoy the dry rubbing and tugging at my skin. you can only avoid that over 2 minutes by applying a generous amount of gel, but it's a small tube. my skin looked a little brightened afterwards but not as soft and bright as many other exfoliators (scrubs, peels, masks, serums, etc). this is $12.99, which doesn't seem like as great of a value after seeing how much you need to use. i didn't like the application, results, or price enough to reorder this.
affordable, average mascara. reviews when i ordered this were raving about it. it's not bad, but it's not all that. many more reviews have been added since then that reflect that.

working well. i needed a brush for my cats because the one i've been using removes almost too much hair and hurts my one cat plus it's uncomfortable to hold. the brushes i've been seeing look flimsy and painful with their wire tips. i liked the rubber tips on this so took the chance. it's working great so far. i can tell it doesn't hurt my cat...although she still doesn't love what's happening. it smoothed their hair without pulling it all out. the bristles kept their shape. the button pushed all the hair up, so i could cleanly and easily pull it all off. it's more comfortable to hold, and the cover is actually helpful to keep the bristles clean and protected from being bent. it's a little large for even my large cats but totally doable. it would definitely work for larger dogs as well. the price is reasonable and considering so many other similar brushes received poor reviews, i'm especially happy with this for the price.

clean, citrus, pine. i bought this out of curiosity about foam cleansers and because a reviewer said it smells like coconut. actually, it smells like citrus pine to me, which makes a lot more sense looking at the pinecones on the package and the fact is says there pine leaf, grapefruit, and citron extracts. it's a nice scent if you like those. anyway, i'm finding one pump of these foams work for me (maybe i would need more if i was wearing makeup, and i wish i could tell you how well this removes makeup). this spread thicker than other foams i have used so far. it felt like it did a good job cleaning and left my skin soft and fresh. the price is on par with other foam cleansers i've tried. this would last me a long time since i only need one pump, but i'm just as happy with cheaper cleansers with scents i prefer.

pretty and natural looking lashes!. my daughter and i tried the lashes out as soon as we got them. we wore them when we went out and they were beautiful and natural looking lashes. we love these and i would definitely buy them again. they came with a nice eyelash tweezer too!

works great, i love this item.. this works so good on face and hands and other dry skin areas. it's easy to use and feels so good. it really hydrates your skin. i use it every week. i will be buying more as gifts for my daughters birthdays.

great little hair dryer. i loved that it came with an assortment of attachments. there are three settings on the hair dryer; fan, low, and high. also it has a cool button. using it on low there was more than enough heat to dry my long hair in a short time. the big attraction is that this takes up very little space in my tiny bathroom.
great price, great colors polish. great colors and nice metallic shine! will rebuy.

wow amazing stuff!. i was searching for something with volufiline and found this inexpensive tube. thought i would take a chance with it being much less expensive than others i found. it was delivered on time and packaged really professional and nice. i couldnt wait to dab some on my eye areas. i went back to the mirror about 30 minutes later and almost every bit of puffiness was gone. so, i dabbed a little more around the area and much to my surprise, my eye area looked like i just had botox! i have used it going on almost 2 days and have already ordered more of their products. going to see how the gold milk steam cream 200g does on my mature skin along with the pancoat pop vita gloss+lipstick+tint works out.these are asian companies and made.. just as the manufacturer describes - "cheap and works . it has a nice soft aroma that goes away quickly as it is put on the skin.i am shocked that there are not any other reviews for this product...for the price and quality, so far i am super pleased and would recommend this product to others.

for me, this is a fantastic product; i'm grateful i found it.. my skin has always been, at best, blotchy, and if i try some kind of coverup, i usually break out. i'm not sure what led me to this, but i picked this brand because it didn't seem to have any ingredients in it that i needed a chemistry degree to evaluate. good choice. no, great choice. i have been using it for three or four days, and my skin is obviously clearer, almost not blotchy at all! this is amazing. (would it work for you? only one way to find out. tty it.)

left hair shiny. scalp itched. hair fell out.. shiny hair is nice - i've used a vinegar rinse for years, didn't need it with this shampoo. however, my scalp itched incessently, and my hair continued to thin. i think if i kept on using it, i'd have become tonsured. i have gone back to the recipes in grow hair fast, have made my own shampoo, used it for two days - and no more itch, and increased confidence i won't go bald.

serious staying power completely non-drying! winner!. i received a sample of this in my ipsy bag, fell in love, then began the hunt for the right shades. this is the best lip stain/ long wear lippie i've ever used. great pigmentation, smoking the, feels like nothing when wearing, the only truly non-drying lip stain or extended wear lipstick i've ever used. it really does last all day. if going for full coverage make sure to give it a solid 5 minutes to set. the hardest part is finding just the right shade. i ended up scouring youtube for swatches. really love and recommend.

seriously, ditch the pouf. you need this :). my new love- good bye pouf balls. this is amazing, really feels like it is exfoliating, especially now with my dry itchy winter skin. i love this. kept one, will be giving the other two away with nice shower stuff as gifts, then will order more for myself. i wish i had of found these years ago.adding to previous review- i am finally ordering another 3 pack. i gave away 2 of the first 3 pack as stocking stuffers to family. now everyone in my family is talking about these and wanting them. *please note, if you have really sensitive skin (like me) these work great, just remember don't scrub as hard as you would with your everyday pouf ball thing. these do the exfoliating job just great without lots of pressure. also, mine has held up beautifully. i throw it in the wash and air dry, still looks new. i really love how i can use on back. i know it sounds silly to get this lathered up (hahahaha) over a product, but this is a game changer.

pretty scent long lasting!. this is a lovely smelling perfume smells just like juicy! it lasts a very long time just about as long as juicy does and it does not have an over bearing scent like some perfumes it comes in a good sized bottle that will last me for quite a while! very happy with this purchase will buy again and will also try other scents form watermark beauty!i was fortunate to receive this product at a discounted price during a special promotion to test in exchange for my honest and unbiased review.the discount has not influenced or impacted my judgement of this product. i take this seriously and include my own opinion and experience with each product i review. i am in no way required by the seller to leave positive remarks about their product. if you have found my product review to be helpful, please thumbs up this review. this will make it easier for others to find this review so they may be helped as well.
i love this product. i have one in each car, my handbag, by the front door for when i get the mail. i give them as stocking stuffers.

best product for skin rashes or dry skin. if you, or your child suffer from skin rashes like eczema, psoriasis, or just have dry skin, this is amazing. my 15 month old grandson has had ongoing issues with eczema since birth and this is the only thing that has really worked. we use is everyday and it's just amazing how fast the splotches start to fade away. love it!
good, but.... one was missing the cap. so i can't use that one for anything but my own use, i can't use it for customers.

like the facial roller. i have to admit that i don't use the bottles with the crystals although they do look nice. i wanted to try the facial roller. i had another facial roller that i liked but it disappeared so i wanted to see if this one was just as calming and cool.good news is that the facial roller in the rose quartz massager facial roller with bottles for essential oils is cool and calming. i give it a slight edge over my old one because the rose quartz is pretty. i'm not sure if it is anti-aging because i don't really pay attention to that. if it is having an effect, then great, but for me, the rolling action helps me wind down at the end of the day. the motions are soothing and quartz is cool against the skin. it is easy to clean and it keeps well too. with the two roller bottles, it does make a nice gift set. but this is a set that i'm keeping. hopefully this one doesn't disappear.

smooth application. i like this makeup sponge beauty makeup sponge blender professional foundation sponge. it says "snowflakes" on the plastic box but i don't know if that is the actual brand name. given the teardrop design, it probably can be used with a powder based item like eye shadow, but i prefer to use it for foundation blending/application. i like how sponges can use a bit of water with the foundation to help with spreading the foundation on the skin and this sponge does a nice job of this. the foundation goes onto the skin so it looks sheer, fresh and polished. it also does a good job of blending so concealer conceals but doesn't appear obvious. i like that is easy to clean and doesn't have the "make up sponge" smell. if anything makes me stop using a make up sponge, it is the rubber-y used smell that it can get, but this sponge doesn't have that smell so i'm glad of that.overall, it is a nice makeup tool to have in the make up box. i like it.
works great. small but works perfectly for mixing foundations and other cosmetics, and useful for travel. i like it!!
great mascara. not for me but my son's girlfriend loves this product. the brush shape didn't work well with my fine lashes but she says it works well with hers. she loves both of these mascaras!!

works great. i have fine hair and i was concerned that the boar bristle would pull my hair or get entangled in it. so far i'm loving this brush - one benefit over others is that the tips are coated which helps keep it from getting tangled. it is a lightweight brush but seems to be very well made. i've used brushes before (including boar bristles) and i like this one just fine. i've only had it a couple of weeks so if anything changes, i'll add to this post. so far, thought, it seems quality and gives me a perfect curl under on my ends!

good light perm solution. had been using this perm for years when the store quit carrying it. was glad to find it on amazon. it is not a strong permanent solution so it rarely burns the hair. i'm sure you could but it really is good for fine hair. it does have a strong perm solution smell that lasted through the first shampoo, but since it is so good with my hair, it is a small price to pay. it is important to do a test curl if your hair is a bit longer in order to ensure the bottom curls as much as the top. i didn't time it right last time and the bottom of my hair didn't curl as tightly as the top. a test time would have helped. still, overall it is an excellent perm for thin delicate hair.

great product!. smells great, feels good. there are no ingredients which are reactive on my sensitive skin. the measured dose and airless pump are super features. best of all, my muscles are not "twitchy" when i lay down to sleep at night.
didn't work. this did absolutely nothing for my hair. if anything, it made the static worse. this was a disappointment.
good silk nail wrap if you are a pro. this product is great for mending broken and cracked nails, but it is a little difficult to cut the silk to the right size.

perfect fit. these replacement heads were a perfect fit for my rechargeable oral b toothbrush. the bristles are firm, but not hard, so brushing is thorough but not painful. they're also more resilient than the original brush heads which got bent out shape very quickly. by comparison, these hold up quite well. and the price for all 8 heads is quite reasonable. there's no reason why i'll ever buy any other replacement heads as long as i can get these.

good little shaver. one of the trials of growing older is a fuzzy face, so i appreciate the gentle way this shaver attacks that fuzz, whether it's soft and peachy, or stiff where the hair has gone white. no nicks, no burn, no discomfort, just a light buzz, and the hair is gone. sometimes it takes a couple of passes, but it gets the job done. and i love the light that lets me see more clearly where the hair is or isn't. well worth the money in my opinion. runs on a single aa battery.

pleasant. a little goes a long way with this foaming cleanser which is probably why you don't get a lot in the bottle. it lathers up nicely, and comes off leaving a slight slickness on my skin like most moisturizing face or body washes. my face felt good after i used it, clean but not tight or dry.it is awfully pricey for what you get, so i can't tell you to rush right out and get yourself a bottle. i couldn't afford to use it all the time. i note that it comes with instructions on how to reuse the bottle, thereby cutting down on waste. unfortunately it came wrapped in several layers of paper in a special box, so... not quite as small a footprint as they're saying.nice enough, but not a necessity.

great for the whole body. yes, i do love this product. not so much for my face because it's probably the most emollient moisturizer i've ever used, and i don't like the feel of anything heavy on my face, particularly during the summer when the humidity is high. but on the rest of my skin? this feels like heaven. as i've gotten older my skin has gone from mixed to quite dry, and this facial moisturizer just ends the flaking and itching, just stops it dead.i can't say if there's an anti-aging effect going on here since the only place my age shows on my skin is on my face, but if the way my skin feels after applying it is any indication, i'm getting younger by the day. it's a generous 3.4 oz of cream for your money, and you don't need to apply a lot to get the bene fit. so if you have dry skin anywhere on your body, i would say don't hesitate to try this stuff. you may just be happier inside your skin than you have been in a long time.

mystery substance helps quite a bit.. i have no idea what this stuff is or how it works, but it helps my mouth when it's irritated or when i have a sore in it. i had a canker sore (which i tend to get when i'm sick or stressed) and it healed it up before it grew larger as it usually does. i burnt my tongue on hot tea last week and swished this around my mouth mixed with water a few times, and my tongue was fine the next day. it doesn't heal you up right away, but it seems to make you heal faster. it burns and tingles too, so if you hate that feeling i'd avoid it.
dry, do not work, waste of money. they did not work, came dry. 100 percent waste of money. it is as if somebody tried this item out returned it and than they sent it to me.

good hair conditioner - refreshing scent. i have used this conditioner 3 times now. i live in a humid, tropical zone. it works very well - just as well as any other bottled conditioner. all one has to do is modify and adjust the way one is "accustomed" to applying conditioner. it will take some getting used to for me. so far i used a combination of rubbing the bar over my head and running it over the long hair ends placed in my hand. i am very pleased with it. the citrus scent is nice, it isn't feminine or masculine, but crisp and light. i will buy it again.

emergen-c is a staple for me... pink lemonade is a great flavor!. i count emergen-c among my top ten can't live without products. i have at least one everyday. not only do they taste great (most of the flavors), they really do make me feel better, healthier and go a long way toward reducing headaches.the pink lemonade? i was skeptical of it at first but it is really good! my top three favorite emergen-c flavors are cranberry, raspberry and now pink lemonade. all very tasty.pink lemonade will now be a regular part of my emergen-c rotation. yum!

they discolor very easy and did not cut well at all. these were very cheaply made, but i guess in this situation i got what i paid for. they discolor very easy and did not cut well at all. with that being said i need to state that i am use to utilizing professional shears and thinners. these would probably be ok for home use with the occasional bang trim.

i like using this all day long.. i think my skin is beyond redemption from working outside, desert gardening and working inside, housecleaning. but it does feel nice on the skin and has a delightful fragrance.

musky light fragrance with beautiful bottle. i love this bottle! it is a gorgeous color and sleek feminine design! good job bhpc~ i grabbed this body mist because of the bottle and i instantly liked it. light musky, earthy scent. not floral at all, or clean or citrus. if you like more oriental fragrances, as i do you'll like this. perfect for anytime. it's a bit like the way more expensive jean paul gaultier, which i have, wear and love!

for facial use only!. first off, you shouldn't be shaving anything but your face with this razor. norelco's older models seem to be heavier and have more powerful motors; this thing is more like those old electric lawnmowers that couldn't cut grass more than 1/2" high. it gives a middling shave on face and neck, but it certainly can't handle the forest around the great oak tree, if you know what i mean. it also won't do armpits or backs or legs very well.i'd go with an older model that is heavier and seems to have a more powerful motor. you'll need it to clearcut your axillary forest.

this is nice oil. works very well as a beard oil.. i have a big fluffy beard. unfortunately in the winter, it more resembles a brillo pad in texture and i sometimes look like a homeless person.this oil works well to condition and treat your beard, and the skin underneath. i apply it right out of the shower after towel drying my beard while it is still damp. i use three squirts of oil, placed in my palm, run my hands together and massage into my beard. it keeps my beard soft and supple all day, and treats the skin underneath to stop dryness and itching.i almost thought of trimming my magnificent beard down because it was so rough, and it was itchy, this is allowing me to continue to grow it.my beard hair is soft, manageable, and free of knots.the glass bottle is heavy duty, so you can take it when you travel.my only complaint is the cost. it's pretty expensive, but i think a bottle would last you 2 months or so, but it's still a pretty hefty price to pay for a soft and manageable beard, free of itchiness.

a great way to trim your beard!. this is a great way to trim your beard. a definite step up from traditional trimmers. the magic in it is the vacuum that captures and stores trimmed beard and mustache hair instead of letting it fall into your sink to make a mess. you don't make your lady mad, and everyone is happy.the trimmer itself fits comfortably in your hand. it has an detachable cord that allows the unit to be charged. it can operate on the cord or off it's batteries for cordless use. the trimmer is not submersible.the attached guard can be adjusted to 9 length settings with a rotating selector. it can also be taken off for trimming necklines or other areas. there is also a separate smaller attachment that can be used for precision cuts.the vacuum is power and made more powerful over earlier models through the use of the "turbo" button that amps up the cutting power and vacuum power substantially. when you are done cutting your hairs are captured in a removable tray for disposal. there are still a few hairs that don't get sucked up but it a huge improvement over using trimmers without suction.the only negatives are that the hair capture cup is a tad small. there is also a plastic piece that guides hair into the cup that makes neck and cheek-line trimming a little tricky until you get the hang of it.overall a great trimmer for those of us real men with beards. a must have!!

great for making eyes sparkle. this is a very good product for those of us who want to have fun with enhancing skimpy eyelashes. there are some excellent mascaras available, but for pizzazz you can't beat false eyelashes. the only problem, and this isn't a huge one, is that the strip that on which you apply the adhesive is very very thin and flexible. this makes it hard to apply the adhesive evenly and to achieve a strong hold. with practice this becomes less of a problem. the scissors are nice, not spectacular and not very sharp; but a nice addition. all in all a good buy and great for us makeup artists or rather those of us who would like to be.

wanted it to work so badly!. i wanted this to work with my hair style so badly! i've always wanted to wear a crown for an event. it was gorgeous and high quality. i did end up returning it, but it was because of my hair, not the crown itself--it was perfect!

love it!. i used to buy this all the time in the stores, but it is hard to find lately. so glad i found it on amazon!if you've never used it before, it is a very pretty nailpolish that appears to change colors in the sunlight. i recommend using a layer or two over any base color, because it does come on pretty light and adding a base coat can really change the full effect. there are many colors available to choose from, and this one changes from a light green-ish color to a purplish shade.enjoy!

pretty color. i got the retro red. it is a little bright but it is a nice color. applied carefully, it looks nice on a light olive complexion. the lipstick is creamy but just enough to cover smoothly. it hasn't dried my lips so far.

semi-permanent way to add volume. if you have the patience to put these in and take them out carefully, then it is worth the extra time. this between a wig and a weave. the glue tabs are not bulky and can add volume to thin hair when layered. you will need more than one package for full coverage. i got these to fill out thinning hair. a wig is sometimes too hot to wear and a weave can be too painful. i can put these in and take them out when i am ready. there are plenty of videos about this. i got both off black and dark brown to match my hair color. this can be a fun way to get more fullness without spending hundreds of dollars.

the best for preventive maintenance &repair of your skin. quickly approaching (a still, sadly, rather vain) age 40, i have personally spent a small fortune over the years trying to slow the aging process and reverse the effects of too many days spent gardening without sunscreen. i cannot even begin to list all the products i've somewhat foolishly gambled on to get my skin looking better. this product--and several other products offered through the company neoteric (all under the alpha hydrox brand)--are exactly the answer i've been looking for. i've used them both alone and in conjunction with a more expensive brand of anti-aging products (for which i've also left good reviews on this site), and i can see great improvements both ways.i decided to try this brand of alpha hydroxy cream after reading in dr. oz's (and dr. roizen's) book [[asin: you: staying young: the owner's manual for extending your warranty (you)]]. i'd tried several other alpha hydroxy products before this one (i.e. roc, etc.) and must say this particular line (alpha hydrox) is far superior to any other i've used. that it is also apparently considerably less expensive than most is icing on the cake, in my book.regarding this product, i find the key is to use it at least once a day, and always after using a mild cleanser. at my age i still get acne and, despite my sometimes manic picking, i notice it (and any residual puffiness or redness, and resulting scarring) clears up much, much more quickly than it used to. also, my skin breaks out much less than before i used this. the tone and color of my skin are far improved when compared to prior to using this product. i've run out of it before and tried to use something else until i was able to locate more locally, and to my dismay the condition of my skin began to deteriorate.i won't try to insult anyone by saying the alpha hydrox line will remove every wrinkle or fix all your skincare woes. if there is a product out there that does this, i want to know! but for now, this is by far the best line of products i've used. i use this item, particularly, with the line of skincare i reviewed previously, as that seems to address reversing the signs of aging better (where this one, for me, just improves the overall condition and appearance of my skin).

likeable liquid lipstick. to me the shade on the product picture looks like it might have a little pink in it but i don't notice it when i apply it. maybe that's just me regardless, i feel the shade is very pretty...and definitely is metallic.it's also very long-lasting- to the point that later when taking it off, i used both an oil cleanser and makeup remover. transferring is minimal. it actually stays a little sticky the whole time while wearing it, so that makes it a little surprising that it's so long lasting- since many liquids dry completely. it's not overly sticky, so i didn't find it bothersome.applies smoothly- it does feel like a velvety, whipped textureif you're concerned about the appearance of lines on your lips with a liquid lipstick- i feel this is one makes them a bit pronounced.overall, for a liquid lipstick, i think it's pretty good. has rich pigment and has a stand-out metallic lookpackaging is pretty
liking it. very pretty, soft and the coloring looks even better in person. i feel it's a nice wig, especially for it being more of a costume/cosplay type wig and for the price

like the look. soft and pretty. i really like the length and the ombre coloring looks good. stays fastened pretty well on it's own, though, i use a wig-grip band and it keeps in place well. great for cosplay, dress-up or just because

liking it. the skin on my neck has lost a lot of elasticity. i wouldn't say it's in bad shape but i feel it is for being in mid 30s. having health stuff going on, former daily tanning machine user, former smoker and my weight goes up-and-down- all things that have contributed to my skin changes and my neck is no exception. this cream is soothing and leaves a lot of moisturize but not a lot of goop. i feel like my skin looks smoother, though i'm sure more consistent and long-term use will bring the most benefits and results. the texture of it is so creamy and thick and feels great on! arrived sealed and packaged-up really well.

cute. it's really cute and sparkly. quality is fine but feels slightly off compared to other similar headbands in this price range that i've tried. hopefully it holds up well, if taken care of. slightly narrow fit but not too uncomfortable. liking the look and color!
cute!. soft. decent quality. very pretty coloring with the black roots and silver-gray. the length and style look pretty, too. fits good and is styled nicely. looks good, overall like it!

nice and great size. having health issues that causes very dry skin, i appreciate a lotion with better ingredients and moisturizing. this one isn't as thick as some but it's doing the job hydrating. it's a great size too!

all around, a good headset. used this on a ps4 pro and it worked great- clear sound from the game and in chatting. it's bulky but not heavy and comfortable to wear- even for hours at a time. the mic is a good length and able to bend a bit, if needed. the cord seems durable and connected well to the ps4 controller. the controls for the headset itself all work good. all around, a good headset

good quality hair. i ended up dying mine black because i naturally have very dark hair and i was tired of maintaining the lighter color with bleaching and all that jazz. these actually were very easy to dye and look great! i didn't glue mine in i ended up using some clip-in extension pieces and making a ponytail extension out of it. it looks great and the hair is really excellent quality.if you are using them as glue in extensions you will definitely need at least 4 sets of these to get a decent amount of hair throughout your head. it's just not enough otherwise.

kissable lips!. this is a must-have especially during the winter when the wind hits your lips and they become dry and chapped. it gets all the dry flaky dead skin off of your lips leaving them super soft and supple. not the mention the product itself smells and tastes great. 10/10!

fresh & clean. i don't know what it is about goat milk soap/cleansers, but they are so luxurious! this is no exception. i have a pre-teen daughter who is on the cusp of puberty and has been suffering from a little acne. she has extremely sensitive skin so this face wash was the perfect option for her. it has kept her face clear from blemishes without drying out her skin.

i see some results. i'm not even going to lie to ya'll... i wear my mascara thick with multiple layers. this makes it so hard for me to get off. it's not unusual for me to accidentally pull out my eyelashes trying to get my mascara off. this has left my eyelashes looking very sad. i decided to give this a go and i think i see results. my problem is i am defeating the purpose by wearing too much mascara! i think i just need to invest in some fake lashes.

elevate for facials!. i love having this rose quartz roller face massager for applying all types of face masks and treatments to the face.when i put a facemask on i like to roll this over it. the rose quartz feels cool and it just feels so refreshing on the face and neck. it's also easy to clean which is nice. i also apply some lotions / creams with it. i like to apply my hyaluronic acid with this. it seems like it works better than using my fingers alone.what has really impressed me though is the microneedle derma roller. i only use it a few times a week but i really feel like it has helped with my dry flaky skin around my t-zone which has always been a problem for me. my face has never looked better!!

junky. i think the pony tail holders may work for my little girls but the clips - definitely not. the clips are literally all the same just with different accessories glued on. i'm sure my girls will be able to use them on their dolls. such a shame. the organizer box though is nice! i'm sure i'll be able to use it for something else.

salon perfect nails!. i just wan't ya'll to know.. i have never given myself a gel polish manicure in my life before yesterday. i had been wanting to for the longest time, but i wasn't 100% prepared to make the commitment to purchasing the light and the top coats and the bottom coats and the paint, etc, etc..well if you are on the fence, jump it!first of all, the lamp works. you set your timer and once you do that, all you have to do is put your hand it and it starts automatically. awesome! like a real salon. i was able to do my hands in 45 minutes. it would have been even faster but i did a test run on my thumb before doing them all at once to make sure i didn't mess anything up.overall, i am so happy to have this nail curing lamp!
great. great stencils im just mad that i only like one stencil for my face features.
great bundles. great bundles. these bundles are super soft and truths in length. the hair did not have a smell. i did not wash it before installing. the hair issilky and staight.

no mess. i thought this would ne a waste, but boy was i wrong. i love the shapes of the brow stamps and how they are fool proof. the color stays on all day long and even through sweat and constantly touching my face. i love it

lol this closure tho. man let me tell you that this closure is not it. it was beat once i bleached the knots it napped up so much i had to order another closure. the bundles are not true to length and have way too many split ends, after i cut the ends it was more of 14-16 inch bundles. the ends are nappy and it leads me to believe that the hair is a blend of human /synthetic.
meh. toooooo many split ends. already crunchy. do not bleach
great for hair. great for dry scalp. makes my 4c hair shine and more manageable. will order more

not just for bald men. i use this faithfully on my girly areas and it get it baby soft no stubble. love it. i can use it in the shower or in front the mirror. great battery life/ oh he likes it too but we fight over it so i am just gonna order another.
meh. not enough color for me, and it wipes right off. in this summer weather it is a must to have you makeup stay and last all day, my brows were gone in 2 hours.

a must for wig display. what an absolutely beautiful mannequin head. the quality is excellent just like a living barbie doll like quality. the eyelashes are actual fibers, not just painted on and her eyes are beautiful. they did an incredible job with the makeup on this mannequin, but me being me i changed it. she even has pierced ears, love it. this is the 2nd one of these that i have gotten for a display and she is as beautiful as the other.

great bundles. bundles !!! great hair, no smell, no shedding, no ragged ends. hair lasted about 3 weeks then got nappy at the ends. i would not recommend bleaching. its ok quality, hair you get in a pinch when you have an event to attend. not birthday hair. lol

meh. good colors but i needed 3 coates with these small bottles it will be gone in no time. love these colors, so vibrant and feels like spring. easy to apply, easy to take off - gel polish has slowly made its way into my heart. i love them.
meh. didnt work for me. i guess you must have kind of thick brows to begin because painting skin is not good, it peeled right off leaving no trace of brow. too thick to not peel off. im perplexed
you cant cut them. smaller than displayed. hair started to unravels upon removal out the pack. it was a hot mess! cannot cut them

gets and keeps my hair straight. awesome product. yes the smell is terrible and the ingredients are no better, but i may say it gets my 4c hair straight and keeps me from flat ironing it daily. its a lot of steps and not for the faint of heart. it works for me. it kept my hair straight for at least 2-3 months and then my curls reverted back slowly. will buy again.

maybe. makes my hair fuller, and i did like the scent and how easy it was to use. i didn't like how small the bottle is, how much you have to use to get my hair coated, however it doesn't clean well, and gave my hair any extra volume.
had high hopes. not full human hair, its ugly and i cant even tell what is the front or the back.
meh. my curls do not last, but it heats up quickly but for some reason my curls will not last.

cute with aterations. i cut it, did a curl set and steamed the curls with a clothing steamer to set and brushed out.the shade of blonde is very pretty, it is sort of a lightest ash blonde, not entirely platinum but not as yellow as a #613.

silky straight. i love the size and shape of this flat iron. im able to get close to my roots to make my hair silky straight. this size is perfect for long hair and cuts my flat ironing time in half. all it takes is one pass of the iron to make my hair straight. love that it has auto shut off

great for braiding. this hair is amazing! doesn't tangle easy, easy to braid, and after dipping, they hardly fuzz. i've used other brands, and this is by far the best for the price. will definitely buy again.

my favorite brush ever. this is by far the best toothbrush ever. the bristles are super soft and get my teeth and gums clean. i will purchase over and over again. i will never change this is the best brush i have ever had the pleasure of using. this is even better than the electric toothbrush. please do not hesitate to buy you will not be disappointed.

learning curve. i am very happy with this product! there is definitely a learning curve at first but once you get the hang of it it's easy! its not as easy as it looks. youll have to figure out a good technique that works. i have thick curly hair, i use it after i straighten it, my hair has yet to get tangled in it.

nice and soft. cheap, very soft, good quality marley hair. i buy braiding hair on amazon a lot but, never keep track of which i buy. this is my second purchase, different color first time for ombre. i love this hair and it's easy to install. no itching or irritation to my scalp. good smell and color
yes life. did the individual crochet method and loved it. some of the twists are bigger/smaller, used the larger in the back. you will need additional packs if you want a full head. love the inches

nope. makes the most hilarious eyebrows. i am going to try on someone else maybe thats the issue. the stencils are too long i have thin short brows and this does not fit my face at all. package arrived on time is about this best thing about this product. sorry but no!!!!
perfect for varietys things. i use these containers for very thing when we on vacation from lotions to sprays

really cute. cute but thing. i ordered an additional pack to make it fuller, but that is all i have to complain about. others may like it as it is but i prefer big and full hair. i will order a 26 or 28 inch to make it full and long. i always wanted a bang wig.

my new favorite lashes.. these eyelashes are not for the daily wearer. if youre looking for dramatic, extremely voluptuous eyelashes, these are the ones you need to buy. for those that are looking for everyday wear that looks natural, i would advise you to look at the wispy type. they have cross hairs patter that look gorgeous. they lasted for over a week and i slept in them

good for those orange roots. i use this to tone my closures after i bleach them. works like a charm to take the redness or orange out of the hair. works like a dream and it makes the hair much softer after bleaching, i did not get the crunchy roots.

baby soft feet. do not be alarmed by the peeling or non peeling, it took a few days to get my feet to peel. when they finally did peel it left my feet looking younger and softer. i will purchase again
i have had multiple dryers this is the best. heats up fast and has extreme drying power it dries my hair in 15 minutes instead of the usual 30-40 minutes to dry my thick hair. gets my hair shiny.

good for burns. i use this for sun burns, and other burns. i also use on my face and skin to calm down my irritation after wearing a face mask for 12-16 hours a day while at work. i place a quarter size amount in my hand ans massage through my skin. it soothes my face and leaves my skins feeling soft and supple. i love this stuff

super thick. these are fashion lashes, not for daily use. they are very long and noticeable. great for nights out and picture taking. not really intended for work or school. they are easy to put on and take off, but they rip easily. they are very dramatic and long so be aware.

my go to lashes. great for daily wear, i even sleep in them. they come off easily when i need to remove and do not pull my own lashes out. they do not feel like mink lashes and seem more of a plastic feel, but are soft and mimic mink lashes great. they are think and luscious but are not cartoony. i have had this pair on for 4 days now and still look great. everyone thinks i put them on daily but, nope i sleep in them and they do not get bent, fold, or lift while i sleep. they are easy to put on, i prefer using hair glue and install them directly above my lash line to prevent my lashes from being removed. i will order more.

great lashes. good lashes but not dramatic enough for me. they are lightweight and stay on for at least a week almost two. the length is good but the drama isnt there. these are good for everyday use for me. i would buy again.
does not stick to my greasy face. i was very hopeful for this item but sorry it does not work for me i have oily skin and they do not stick after a while.

thin. i am more of a thick hair girl so i was not amazed at this wig. i have a large head so the wig looks very thin on me. the construction is superb and the knots are bleached and the hairline plucked. perfect if you have a thin face. the length is fine

worst closure ever. got this to add to my bundles, horrible, sheds, is nappy, and brittle, i have never had closure this awful. ever. i wet it every hour and as soon as i look n the mirror its poofy, nappy, and zero waves. i wish i could return. please do not order this closure!!!!!!!!!!! ive had it for two weeks installed. and cant take it anymore. i am replacing the closure this weekend
ok closure. i purchased this to match other hair. blended perfectly.

too good to be true, no go on this one. bundles are thin. i have an undercut and both sides shaved i used all except 1/2 bundle. hair sheds, ends are thin. so thin in fact i cut off about 4 inches off the ends. it doesn't tangle that much. no smell. hair is dry and doesnt hold curls well. the curl patter fell straight out the pack. the hair is not true to length. the 28 is more like 24 and after cutting the ends its like 20. not the best or worst. wont purchase again

been using it for more than a year!. this product is a lifesaver for me. a lifesaver of hiding embarrassing ugly marks. i was getting horrible cystic type boils on my neck. i wore turtle necks as long the season would allow. i discovered this stuff and it covers them so well, you can't even tell there is red/purple marks or new sore ones! you can of course see some bumps but blending the color with my skin, it's not noticeable. it also helps to heal them and i've been getting less and less and the year went on. now i use more sporadically, to hide what scars are left but this product seems to help them fade! if i apply it when i feel one coming on, it helps to reduce the inflammation and rids it quicker. that could really be because there is green tea in it. my daughter uses it to hide her teen acne and in fact my son puts a teeny tiny drop on his cystic spots as well to tone down the redness. you truly cannot tell it is even makeup.we are fair, freckled and use the lightest one. well worth it.

nice grooming set. my husband used this kit and took, when asked to do a bit of a review on it for me, took it very seriously. the price isn't cheap so he wanted to make sure to really look at everything as he used it. here is what he had to say:"you have a pack of accessories here so i thought i would run through them in turn to tell you what you are getting and my impression of itshampoo and body wash.okay, i ran through this way too quick and used all of it. it's good. it's really good and i couldn't really get enough of it. so that's a plus and a negative in that there isn't really a lot of it to begin with.face wash.i love to get in there and give my face a right good scrubbing. this helps. the wash is thick and gel like with the exfoliating, and it does feel like you have given your face a good scrub after use. you do feel cleaner after use.shave creami'm not one for using cream very often. i prefer basic foam from a can. but wow. this stuff leaves your face feeling clean and fresh after shaving. not only that but incredibly soft.moisture creamthis is really not something i use at all. i would think it best to use after shaving because you are stripping moisture from your face, but in that regard the shave cream is sufficient. i just don't personally have a need for a separate moisture cream. so it is sort of hard to form an opinion about it.what i can tell you is that it doesn't really have a scent, my face does feel super soft. on the downside it is a little messy and i found myself wiping away the excess.for the most part then i really like this set. it comes in a handy pouch you can use long after the accessories are empty. however, that won't take too long because the bottles are very small. it's something for people who aren't concerned about the cost. it's very expensive. is it worth the cost for me? not really. not in terms of either quality or quantity but if the price was lower i would be recommending to everyone."there you go guys and gals. that's what he thought about the set. he's still talking about it so he did like it, just thought it was a bit much.

probably works well depending on your skin type. my husband is the one that used this because he was going through a rough patch. he is more prone to acne than i am and recently he's been getting more and more breakouts. i asked him to let me know how he felt about it after using it. here is what he had to say about it:"so like many people i have been wearing a mask all day. it's hot and it becomes humid under the mask. perfect breeding place for acne. it was forming all around my mouth. i'm not going to complain about it. just that's how it is now, and we have to work with it.this serum seemed to be working at first. it's easy to apply using the dropper. just squeeze a few drops on to the affected area and let it dry in.you will notice when you use it that your skin appears to be tightening. also with continued use the red marks on your face will lighten and eventually fade.i had to stop using it. i believe it was working at first but after some continued use it was making things worse and the acne was spreading. i have a slightly oily skin type and this may not have been best suited to me.glad i tried it and i have a feeling that it may work better for a different skin type than mine."there you have it. that's what he thought about it.

great brushes!. this is a very good set of brushes and combs, especially for the price. they work great. you get four things in this set. you'll receive a paddle brush, a rectangle comb, a detangler hair brush, and a tail comb. i don't really use the combs as much as the brushes but did give them a bit of a testing so i could type a review. i absolutely love all of these brushes and combs. they are sturdy and work very well. when used for what they are supposed to be used for specifically i thought they all held up well and did their jobs. they detangled perfectly and when used for styling they were easy to hold on to, didn't get in the way at all, and worked the hair into it's style nicely.i would recommend these if you are looking for a good set of hair brushes and combs that won't cost you much. these are terrific for that!

make your eyes feel delightful!. these are terrific! i really like these hemp and rose under eye mask patches. if you have puffy tired eyes that crave some tender loving care then these just may be what you need. they work so well. you put them on under your eyes after washing and drying your face. just leave them on for 10-15 minutes and when you remove them you gently massage the product into the skin. that's it!the one thing that isn't so great is that they are so hard to separate when you first open the packet and take them out. they stick together and to themselves and it's very frustrating trying to get them without losing the liquid and getting yourself all covered in it. other than that these are a definite win.

nice kit for men. my husband put this kit to good use so i asked him if he'd mind letting me know what he thought about it. he didn't mind at all and this is what he had to say:"very comprehensive, quality kit for men. if you're like me you will find there are items in here that you likely won't really need. i personally don't use hair pomade or those light shave creams. i prefer foam and my hair just sort of keeps my head warm.aside from the items i can't use there are some great items in here for everyone. the body scrub soap like and feel a good bit more fresh after using it. but my preference, and where i really came to appreciate this, was with the facial moisturizer and lip balm. i don't usually buy those items and let the winter have its way with my face. i ride a bike everyday. but using the items in this kit really helped me keep my skin from drying, and my lips. the lip balm tastes and smells great, too."that's what he had to say about it. he did genuinely seem to enjoy using this kit.

works perfectly. i really like this face wash. it's one of the most gentle washes i've ever used. it has the lightest smell of cucumber which i don't like too much but at the same time it is a refreshing clean smell and it isn't overwhelmingly strong. it seems odd to give a five star to something with a scent that isn't quite one that is liked but this is a very good face wash and i absolutely love how clean it leaves my face feeling. it doesn't cause a red face or breakouts. it does seem to help prevent acne and even help to minimize it when it happens. it's definitely a new favorite.

very pretty. these headbands are fantastic. there are 9 in this set and they come in a variety of colors and designs. you get three velvet headbands with pearls- pink, black, and beige, 3 fabric headbands- 2 have flower patterns and one is black with white stripes, and three knitted- green, grey, and black.these are very well constructed. the only thing is that after a little while they did begin to dig in bit where they rest at the ends. not too much but enough to make it uncomfortable after a long period of time. they still so nice it's worth the slight suffering.these are very nice and worth it.

works great. this shampoo and conditioner leaves hair feeling clean, soft, and manageable after the first use. it smells nice, too, which is also a plus!my hair is not that of a teen or even young adult anymore so it's been through a lot. when looking for shampoo and conditioning products i tend to look closer at those that claim to make hair stronger, reduce breakage, and things with words like "restore" and "fortify". these hit the mark so i decided to give them a shot.i've been using them about three weeks and i think that they are definitely doing my hair some good. it looks healthy and feels very soft. the conditioner does a good job with tangles and knots. i do sometimes still use a leave in conditioner or separate type of moisture just because it's winter my hair is increasingly dry on any given day depending. i can't tell for sure about the breakage but it does seem stronger. i suppose in many ways they go hand in hand. it has more pull to it so it's not snapping and breaking as much.i like this. a little goes a long way as well which is nice.

my lips and this didn't have a lasting friendship. unfortunately i wasn't a fan of this one. it didn't do much to help my lips. rather than exfoliate it actually just seemed to dry out my lips and not just a little bit. it wasn't fun. i tried it a few times, as directed. just apply a small pea-sized amount to the lips using a finger-tip, scrub gently in a circular motion to remove the dead skin cells for about 30 seconds then rinse or eat off remaining sugar. all of that was done, rinsed not eaten though the one thing that was good was that it didn't taste half bad. alas, my poor lips were left in worse shape than ever. dry and roughed up. no matter how hard or gentle i used the stuff over a three week period. i finally gave up and had to admit defeat. perhaps others had better luck?

good scrunchies but.... (3.5)beautiful scrunchies. these scrunchies are very nice. they are made from 100% real natural raw mulberry silk. what makes these special is that they are not supposed to pull your hair as much or get stuck like many others do. that is true of these! the scrunchie works great. it goes in nicely, holds the hair back, doesn't slide out, and when it's taken out there is little to no hair caught in it.however, i can't really see that the price for one is a great one. this is something you have to sort of weigh the options out though for yourself. i have noticed less hair pulling and loss with this hair thing, but the cost is up there. it's a good scrunchie but it's truly up to you if you'd spend that much on one. maybe the other options make the prices seem less daunting?

really good stuff!. this body scrub is really nice. it smells so good and it smooths the and nourishes the skin perfectly. when you rub this gently onto your skin then rinse it off you can instantly feel the difference. it feels as if all the dead skin has been removed and your pores have been opened. it leaves you soft and refreshed as well as incredibly relaxed.this is a big jar as well that you get and it's worth it for the price. it's definitely worth giving a try if you are interested and able to. it's really good. i love it.
