great design!!!. these silicon brackets were the best product i ever purchased. it has made breathing so much easy while wearing masks. i normally wear glasses so whenever i wear a mask it always fogs with my glasses esp when it's cold outside. after putting these on i am finally able to breathe and not worry about the way the fabric touches my face when i am walking outside and no fogs in my glasses. the brackets were lightweight and comfortable to wear,great buy in these difficult times.

good addition to the collection. i bought this piece specifically for the summer months and i've always been fond of blonde hair, but didn't think i would like it as much as i do. it is so cute on me, very stylish, affordable and breathable. it doesn't ever feel heavy or look awkward; i just throw it on and go. i've worn this piece to bed many times. get up and brush out the kinks, looks good as new. for synthetic hair, this one is hard to beat. i love changing up my look so this piece will be retired in a few days, but i loved this wig so much that i wore it for two weeks in a row & i honestly can't remember the last time i did that with a synthetic piece & it still looks as good as it did on the first day. go ahead and buy it.

great design, improve back?. this is the best clipper i've ever had and now that my hands aren't as agile as they once were, perfect! the handle is thicker than standard and textured w/3 indented slots; has indented area where thumb fits comfortably; is not the shiny stainless steel that is so slippery. now the back part/bottom is the shiny steel...i think they should have made it textured too, to ease slipperiness! the actual clipper cutting edge is the smile shape ). the back also has a "keyhole" for hanging it if you wanted. great little file w/nicely plumped end for ease of use. a "nail catcher"..meaning a black tough cover that when not in use snaps on to the clipper. all this comes in a handy little black case

great for shaving nicks. i have started shaving with a safety razor and well i'm still learning it so i have had a few nicks and cuts. i got this so i could stop the bleeding from nicks. it comes with a decent amount that i am able to fit in a tin i keep next to my other shave gear and has stopped the bleeding from the nicks i have. i like it more than the styptic sticks i have used in the past.

different than what i'm used too but in a good way. i got this because i was intrigued by how they could improve on the old spray version of breath spray. it comes in two pieces on the base which is where the battery, controls, and charging port is, and a pod for your flavor. it has a usb c charging port which i really enjoy and seemed to charge in a decent amount of time. i got the extra mint flavor and it tastes fine. the thing i was not ready for is instead of spraying it comes out like a vapor. i don't know if they would render the spray versions moot but it is nice with a good flavor.

you'll need more than 20pcs as they are thin. good quality real human hair. easy to put on. i washed my hair, sandwich the extensions, and then used the flat iron just for a second to melt the glue and to blend the extensions better with my natural hair. ive got a blonde color t18/60 + 60# in size 16 inches. the hair color doesnt match my natural hair 100%, but it doesnt look bad when the hair is blended. please note that there's not much hair in the package (20pcs but the hair is thin) so you'll need more than one pack.

good nail drill, not cordless though. i like this nail drill. it's basic, it's simple, easy to hold while working. it comes with a cord, 11 tips for different purposes and 50 polishing rings. there is a manual which describes different tips which is helpful for beginners. you can cut/grind/sculpt/polish your nails and even cut the cuticle. this is not the most powerful device on the market but it does the job. if you are looking for a drill to work specifically on acrylic or other artificial application nails (or nail removals) please consider getting a more powerful devise. please note that this is not portable cordless nail drill and in order for it to work you'll have to use the cord and plug it in.
thankyou.. superb quality. fast delivery- stellar customer service.. much appreciated..
best quality. this is real and pure organic beeswax.. i was taken aback of the high quality compared to the rest i tried.. im sticking w this thankyou!

not impressed. oh my, where to begin? no instructions. no way you can put this on the corner of the wall since it doesn't bend. the cutout notch isn't big enough, so it doesn't sit flush on a wall corner. catnip is included but no idea where to put it since there aren't any instructions. there's holes in the back. does catnip go there or is that for screwing it into the wall? my cats were not interested in this.

high quality warm headband. new balance is a popular brand in our home. my husband & sons wear nb shoes because they're so comfortable. the same quality applies to this headband. it has a good stretch to fit larger heads, the seams are sewn in tight & neatly, and the material is soft. another great product from new balance!
not a fan at all. not very lightweight. this stuff was thick and not easy to use. because it was so thick it was not natural looking at all. i am not satisfied with this and wont be using.
cute. cute colors my toddlers gets to pick the colors she wants when we get our hair done. it's has a good stretch, great for my baby's afro hair. excellent price point
very hydrating. great moisturizer. it goes on light and doesnt make my skin feel sticky, it absorbs quickly leaving my skin hydrated, it's also good for the summer

using it every day it's an excellent product. i can't tell you how much this have been helping my little ones eczema that itches all day behind the legs..... once i rub it on the spot the skin is immediately hydrated, stop itching. the scaring and rough skin is also clearing. am really happy using this product. and i will definitely buy more. i also it on my edges too and i have noticed growth.
i want to like it but i cannot. so i thought this will be nice for my 4c hair but no. so i used it on my wigs and i didn't really like the results. its definitely not for my hair type.

smells nice. i want to use this spray on the bedding. all the bedding. makes it smell so nice for when we all go to bed. just a nice fresh scent.i can't really pick out a particular scent with this spray. it's a nice combination though.with spring here and the windows open again, we're all loving having a nice fresh scent in our bedrooms and our beds using this spray.

so many stencils. i really love having so many stencils to choose from. when i found a couple i really liked, i numbered them so i'll remember which ones i like.the powder is messy. have to be so careful not to get any on myself because it will stain.the color is nice for my brown/gray hair.it takes a bit of trial and error when first using this kit. not to dab too hard to have the powder go on way too dark. finding the right stencil that fits my face.i did a lot of scrubbing until i finally got the combination down. so far the color has lasted about 3 days. i'll use a brush to fine tune them a little.love having actual eyebrows again.

how to open?. looking at the design of the case this is in, it looks like the smaller part of the top should open. if it is suppose to open, i can't figure it out. so, i just unscrewed the entire top off to use it. not really a big issue.the foundation itself is waterproof. does last all day with no problem.it's a nice smooth foundation. easy to apply with the sponge that comes with this.it does cover up some of the skin flaws.it's an okay foundation for a decent price. kept my skin soft all day.was easy enough to wash off at the end of the day. i would buy again.

nice and compact. i like the size of this. it's nice and small so it's easy to keep in my purse for when i need it.easy to use. just roll on my face and it absorbs any oils without messing up my makeup.does come with a second ball.not sure how long the one ball will last since i just started using it. seems that it would last quite a long time.

it's just okay. i don't like the pump of this wash. it's so small that it takes so many pumps to get a small amount. i finally gave up and just poured it out of the bottle.scent....not the greatest. it doesn't last long which is nice because it's not a scent i want to smell like when i get out of the shower.did lather nice. rinsed off and i felt clean.maybe men would like this better than women. and some may like how it smells. just not a scent for me.

nice machine. after using different tattoo machines, this one is more just for beginners.it's light and easy to use. kit comes with almost everything needed to start practicing.i wanted to see how good this machine would do with lines. it's okay but, the machine does get a bit on the warm side after having it run for about 60-90 mins.all in all this kit is nice.

nice variety. it's so hard to find good tweezers that actually grab the hair. these tweezers seem to work nicely.i tried 3 of them so far and i have no complaints.the case is nice to keep them all organized and easy to find. the eyebrow brush was a nice addition to this set.the curved scissors work great also.glad to have this set in my collection. will make it so much easier when i need to do a bit of face grooming.

doesnt work on coarse facial hair. i got this product hoping it would help with my super coarse facial hair (im a woman). it doesnt, but that isnt the products fault. i read online that really coarse hair has to be pretty long (like half an inch long!) for waxing to be effective, and who would want to let their facial hair grow like that? not me!it works for other types of hair, though. i was able to wax my legs. the temperature control is reassuring (no worries about burns), and the roll on applicator is way less messy than sticks in a pot. it comes with plenty of supplies, too. so, even though i didnt get my wish, i think this kit is a good one.

as effective as other brands; bit harder to peel off the backing; wasteful packaging. these patches work as well as other patches i've tried. they are not a miraculous cure-all, but they do help flatten out the acne and draw out the stuff that needs to be drawn out (don't want to get too gross and graphic here). they are small (1 cm diameter) so the coverage is limited, but they adhere well.there are a couple of cons with these that lower my score:> they are harder to peel off the backing than others, and it's easy to fold over the edge of the patch when removing it, making it less effective. other brands i've used have slits in the backing material, making it much easier to dispense a patch without damaging it.> the packaging is very wasteful. each sheet of 20 comes in its own box. you could easily fit several sheets into one box. either the box should be made much smaller or each box should hold multiple sheets. there's no need for all this packaging waste.three stars (average). while these work as well as other patches, there are other options that are better choices.

nice compact size, but too little witch hazel to be of significant benefit. this are mini wipes, with each measuring about 5.25 by 4.25 inches. they are packaged very compactly, making them easy to take along in a gym bag, backpack or even in your pocket. the packet is soft, which means it's not ideal for dispensing one wipe at a time without some measure of struggle. there's an adhesive flap to cover the opening, but again, as with pretty much any packet with this design, the flap doesn't do nearly as good of a job as a hard plastic cover.the wipe material is soft but pretty durable. it's designed to be a "prep" before using a stick-on breathing strip on your nose. as such, it doesn't do all that good of a job. while it does contain witch hazel, there's too little of it for the wipe to perform well. witch hazel is the last ingredient (after water, glycerin, and aloe). witch hazel is a great prep for any adhesive to ensure a good skin bond. using these wipes is really no better for that task than plain water.while it is a comfortable wipe to use for general face and hand cleaning, given the price and the lack of unique benefits re: better adhesion, i see this as a 3 star (average) product at best. it's not something i'd get again.

excellent performance; enjoyable scent; very little needed per use. i'm very pleased with this face cleaner. it is a medium thick consistency that has a creamy texture. it lathers a bit slowly at first, but builds up a nice, thick lather after a few moments. not much is needed per use -- just a dab will get the job done. it cleans very well but doesn't leave my face dry. i've had zero irritation from it even though it's a good, deep cleaner.the scent is very enjoyable. it's a light floral/fruity scent that is unique. it is not overpowering, and doesn't linger after rinsing.the tube comes nicely packaged for protection during transit. it's in a reinforced box cardboard box that is shrink wrapped. even if it's sent in a padded envelope there's very little risk of the tube leaking in transit.no complaints at all. it works very well, has an enjoyable, unique scent, is packaged well, and since so little is needed per use, the value is pretty good. five stars!

very good performance and an excellent scent. i'm very pleased with all aspects of this face wash. it's a medium consistency that dispenses easily. the pump mechanism works well to output just a small amount at a time which is a plus since not much is needed per use. it lathers readily and does an excellent job of cleaning. my face feels tight after using it but in a good way -- a clean tightness rather than a dried out tightness.the scent is excellent. it's a woodsy type of scent that is different and very enjoyable. the scent does not linger after use (which is a shame since it is such a nice smell).it's pricey per ounce, but considering how little is needed for good results, the cost per use is not bad at all. plus the scent is so unique that, for me, it's worth the extra amount. five stars!

unusual soap, but works well. i've not come across a face soap in this format -- it's a stick format, much like an antiperspirant. you rub the stick on your dry face, then use water. it's different but very easy to get used to quickly.the soap doesn't lather all that much but it does do a good job of cleaning without drying out my face. the scent is quite nice, with the eucalyptus coming through the most. it's a medium/mild level of scent that is noticeable without being overwhelming. the scent does not linger after rinsing. the soap itself is black due to the inclusion of charcoal.the dispensing tube is well done, with a screw base that pushes up the soap easily and evenly. it also has a screw top cover, which is a nice touch for keeping the lid affixed if you take this while traveling or use it in a gym bag.it's an unusual but enjoyable twist on face soap. a bit pricey for the amount you get, but it's sufficiently unique to justify the cost, in my opinion. five stars.

some nice items, but disappointing quality for toenail clippers. this is a comprehensive set of nail cutting/trimming/maintaining tools. the standard clipper is very nice -- solid, sharp, and well up to the task of handling fingernails and lighter toenails. the various tools are also of decent quality.what's not so good is the toenail clippers. it has a rather lightweight feel to it compared with other clippers i've used. the short handles make it less comfortable to use than other clippers. more importantly, the spring mechanism failed within the first couple of minutes of use. it uses two leaf style springs that push the jaws apart. the problem is with how they attach to the handle. there are two little prongs for each spring that fit into two little holes in the handle. for mine, the pins are too short to make a solid connection, so one falls (or rather, jumps) out no matter how many times i've tried to seat it properly into the handle (see photo). it can be used without the spring, but it's quite cumbersome to do so. given the importance of the toenail clipper to the overall usefulness of the kit, i see this as a 2 star product.if the springs were better it would be 4 stars since, even when properly functioning, the clippers are not as easy to use as others, but warrant 4 stars given the low cost compared with better quality clippers.

proven ingredients, but a poor value. im not all that impressed with these products. neither container lists the ingredients on the label, instead providing the ingredient list on a card thats in the box. it shows that the cleaner is a 2% salicylic acid wash, which is a pretty tried and true formulation for treating acne. it is a low-lather, but still effective cleaner, but i didnt experience any difference with this compared with other 2% salicylic cleaners that cost far less. its a fine cleaner, but way overpriced for such a tiny (0.51 oz) container.the repairing night cream is a combination of retinol (0.05%), niacinamide (3%), and hyaluronic acid (2%). all are proven performers, but again, its quite overpriced considering how low of a percentage of retinol is in the formulation. it does a decent job of moisturizing and did not cause any skin irritation. i am a fan of retinol, but the concentration in this cream (0.05%) is well below what i usually use (either 0.1% or 0.5%).while this product combo is on the right track, the value is just not there considering the amount in the container (one-half an ounce for each). while i would certainly recommend a salicylic acid wash and a retinol-based cream, there are many other options that provide these options at a far lower cost. four stars for performance; 1 star for value; overall rating of 2.5 stars.

beautiful cobalt blue bottles; great caps; so-so sprayers. i love the look of these bottles. they are cobalt blue, and really stand out from the usual amber tints. the bottle itself is well-made and sturdy. the included caps (2 were provided) are of excellent quality, with polycone inserts to maintain an air-tight, leak proof seal. the included sprayers (2 were provided) are functional, but rather cheap in terms of build quality, especially the trigger. it also comes with a tiny little funnel that is way undersized and pretty useless given the bottle volume, and a few black labels (which require a white pen, which is not included).each bottle comes in a bubble pack sleeve, but the box itself is rather thin with limited protection. these are a notch below other bottles i've received when it comes to manufacturer-provided protective packing. still, the bottles did not break or chip in transit.the bottles needed a good wash before use since the outside had some type of greasy-feeling film. i would have washed them regardless of their condition, but these definitely needed a good washing before use.taking everything into consideration i'll rate these as 4 stars. well worth considering if you need a more colorful option than amber and don't expect to be using the sprayer much (or at all).

excellent lather, performance and scent; fussy bottle. i'm impressed with this face soap. it's very thick and silky, and only a very small amount is needed to get good results. that's especially welcome to find out given the price for a pretty small bottle. it lathers up well and does a good job of cleaning without leaving my skin overly dry. it is a bit more intensive than other face soaps, so my face does feel a little 'tight' after using it. however, it's not excessive, and well worth it given how well this soap cleans if you have an oily complexation. the charcoal makes the soap dark, but it's not as jet-black as other charcoal soaps i've used. it's more of a deep gray.the scent is also quite nice. it's a medium/light intensity and has sort of an after-shave smell to it. the scent does not linger much at all after rinsing. while i tend to prefer unscented soaps, this scent is pleasant and enjoyable.the only con is the bottle. getting the pump nozzle to pop up was a chore since the retaining ring the pump head screws into also rotates, making it a struggle to get the nozzle to pop up. i eventually got it working, but have noticed that the pump leaks at the stem. it's a small leak, but it adds up over a few days to make a mess on the bottle and waste soap. given the price, the pump mechanism should have been of better quality.one star down for the bottle issues, but otherwise, it's a very enjoyable soap to use.

nice compact size, but very cheap construction. i like the small, compact size of these spray bottles. the height makes them easy to stow in a cabinet without taking up much room at all. of course, a small size means small capacity, but for my needs that's a perfectly fine trade-off.what's not so good is the overall build quality. the bottles are made of thin plastic that look and feel cheap. the trigger action on the sprayers is not smooth or reliable. the sprayer hose detaches easily.given the price, these are 2 stars for value -- they look, feel and perform as a bottle you'd get in a dollar store. a shame, since it can be hard to find compact spray bottles.

nice balance between soft and firm; some fitment issues. this is a good middle ground between the standard oral-b brand brushes and the ultra soft oral-b brand brushes. i find the standard brush to be a bit too firm and, while i like the softness of the ultra soft, sometimes i'd like just a bit more firmness to the bristles. this is a good compromise. it's softer than the standard but firmer than the ultra soft.on the downside, it does not fit as well as the authentic oral-b brushes. it's a little bit loose, which causes it to be noisier in operation than an authentic brush. it still works fine and stays on firm enough so there's no danger of it coming off in use, but there's enough play in the fit that it's more buzzy than an authentic.even with the fit issue, this is a decent alternative to the oral-b brand brushes and a solid 4-star brush.

nice look; feels pretty solid; but average in performance & value. this is a dressed up version of the wahl lifeproof shaver (which i also reviewed). it has a more upscale look and feel to it, plus adds a battery gauge to show the charge level. however, the shave quality is the same ok, but not a standout.the case feels more solid than the lifeproof and, while its more of a traditional look, i think they did a nice job with the overall aesthetics. it is pretty grippy even with wet hands. it does not, however, feel as comfortable to hold as the more sculpted models such as most of the panasonic shavers and some braun shavers.the shave quality of this model is identical to that of the lifeproof: very remington in how it feels (close, but rather aggressive). performance is best on the easy spots (cheek) but not as good on the more trickier spots (neck and jawline). the flex head helps with dealing with face contours but it lacks enough travel to do an excellent quality job.the aggressiveness of the shave is dialed down when using it wet. it needs a very, very thin layer of shave cream (the gel style creams work well) or the head gets bogged down.love the trimmer! the positioning could be improved to make it easier to use, but it cuts very cleanly on sideburns and shash trimming.the controls are clean, easy to read and tell you all you need to know (charge and battery status).i like the feel of this better than the wahl lifeproof, but the shave quality keeps this at the same rating (average, which is 3 stars). its a very workable shaver, but for the price there are better choices available from panasonic (anything in their arc line) or, for less money, from remington.

truly some wonderful stuff to fight "winter hands". i hate winter for a lot of reasons, but one of them is that my hands get so dry that i get cracks at my fingertips. its annoying and painful, especially at night. ive tried all sorts of moisturizers without much success. the best results (if you can call it that) have been from using petroleum jelly, but thats messy and it still doesnt work well.this argan oil, however, has been hugely effective. it gave me results right from the first day, and over the course of just a few days i can see noticeable healing of the skin cracks. no more pain and my hands feel far better than any other treatment ive tried.the product comes very nicely packaged, with a nice box filled with shredded packing material to keep the glass bottle safe in transit. it also makes for a very nice presentation should you want to give this as a gift. the bottle comes with a dropper and a spritz head. the latter is my only quibble the spray head didnt work well at all, and made sort of a mess when using it to dispense the oil. i replaced it with the dropper and had much better results.the oil itself has little or no scent. you need very, very little for results i use about 1-2 small drops per hand, and thats more than enough. it spreads easily (as expected given that its oil). it does take a few minutes to soak in my hands are very greasy when i first apply it, but after a few minutes the greasiness goes away. the sheen from the oil stays around longer, but that too dissipates after 30 minutes or so.this can be used for a wide range of applications including face, body and even hair. it comes with a good amount of information to help explain how/where to use it, and how the oil was processed.im very impressed with this oil its the only product ive ever tried that totally worked to solve my dry/cracked hands. its not cheap, but well worth the price if you need a highly effective moisturizer. highly recommend.[sample provided for review]

nice cooling sensation. i have always been curious about trying some of these eye mask patches and i received two different kinds around the same time. i definitely preferred these over the other ones i received. i know it doesnt really matter, but these are so pretty. they have a shimmery gold color to them that just makes wearing them more fun. i dont suffer from eye wrinkles yet, but i do occasionally get bags under my eyes. im honestly not sure if i can say these get rid of the bags, but after wearing them for a little while, they definitely make my eyes feel better, which is still a win in my opinion. you get a ton of them in the container, which is great, but i feel like the container could be a little bit higher quality. its not smooth when you close the lidnot a huge problem, but a better quality container would have made this feel even more luxurious.

too much excess product. these are good, but not my favorite masks. my biggest complaint about these, which others might actually find a benefit, is that i think there is way too much product on these masks. obviously, these kinds of masks tend to be a little messy because of the product that they are soaked in, but with these, they are just dripping. after removing the mask, the instructions say to rub in any excess product into your skin, but there's just way too much and it does not rub in. i have to blot my skin with a towel before rubbing in the excess. other than that, the mask is nice. it feels soothing to the skin, i haven't had any reactions to it and my skin feels soft afterward.

nice but 1 is a bit light on darker skin. these eyeshadow pens glide on very smoothly. one is a solid color and the other two have shimmer. the 03 color pen is really light. it is shimmery and you primarily only see the shimmer which is okay.
does not smell good to me. this product completely turned me off by the scent. is decided to still try it in my hair but i did not find that it was very moisturizing either.
they look okay. these lashes are okay looking. they are not as full as i prefer. they did stick but i didn't feel they were as secure as i'd like for them to be if i'm going out the house.

nice variety, seem to be durable. at this price, this set is a good value in terms of quantity, variety of styles and sturdiness. i've only had them for a few days so i can't say for sure that they're going to be durable, but i did slam them repeatedly on my tile floors with far more force than with the impact of simply falling, and they're still in tact.i have thin hair and the clips grasp nicely and wear comfortably. they open wide enough that i'm sure they'll work for thick hair, too.the colors were a little off, at least on my monitor. the one that looks gold on my screen is actually a light tan. i will probably never wear it out of the house. it looks awful with my red hair and i can't think of many outfits it would match either. that's why the set loses a star for me. the brownish one is lighter than pictured, too.

soybean skin conditioning serum. this soybean skin conditioning serum is a nice light unscented moisturizer. it absorbs quickly and leaves my skin soft. no heavy fragrance or dyes. everything is in japanese so you will need to use a translation tool to read the box. the box comes sealed so i was happy about that.

good castor oil. i love castor oil and use a lot of it, but rarely for my hair. i've never seen or used castor oil "butter" before and i think it's very interesting. all the oils in this product are normally liquid at room temperature so i'm not sure how they got this to have a butter-like consistency. maybe some beeswax or something was added but it's not on the list of ingredients. i really like the tea tree oil scent this castor oil butter has as tea tree is one of my favorite scents. i think this is a very good castor oil product.
looks real. very good fake beard and moustache and fun for cosplay. it looks pretty real when on.

will not turn on. this nose hair trimmer turned on one time after charging, and has since failed to turn on. hubs and i both tried to get it to work, put it back on the charger to be sure, but it's obviously malfunctioning or poorly made. we have tossed it in the trash.

good enough. i have bleached blonde hair with a lot of silver mixed in. i color it at home and if i don't use products to control brassiness my hair will start to turn kind of orangish. i really like this shampoo. it's nice and dark purple and lathers up really nice. it cleans my hair well and thoroughly rinses out. the creme rinse doesn't do much as far as conditioning or de-tangling but should help to keep hair from color warping. it's not as dark purple as the shampoo and has no scent that i can detect.

very good lotion. this is a nice set of 4, 2.53 fl. oz. tubes of moisturizing lotion. my hands and face feel nicely hydrated and there's no annoying scent to deal with. these are the perfect size for a purse, backpack or pocket and they seem reasonably priced. as of this review a set of 4 only costs $14.25.

excellent sweet almond oil. i use almond oil in my handmade soaps to make them extra emollient. it's also a wonderful moisturizer for skin and dry/damaged hair. i think this is very good sweet almond oil, it's 100% almond oil and there's nothing negative i can find to say about it.

pretty headbands. these are pretty, pastel colored cloth covered headbands. i like the scrunchie look they have. they hold my hair out of my face very well and don't bother me much around the backs of my ears. sometimes head bands start to hurt my head but so far these haven't. they're not super good quality - about a dollar each, but they do what i want them to do.

excellent castor oil. i have used a lot of castor oil over the years but mainly in my hand made soaps. i like it to be very viscous, sticky and have that castor oil scent. this oil fulfills all my qualifications for a good quality castor oil. it has many uses besides being a great emollient in soaps, so i will be using it for my skin and hair as well. it's one of the best that i've reviewed so far. please note that this castor oil is for external use only and not to be taken internally. if you want castor oil for that search for food grade castor oil.

very good hair brush. this is the perfect sized boar bristle hair brush to put in my purse or tennis bag. it's not too small but it's not full-sized either. i love these types of brushes the best (especially those with bamboo bristles) because they brush all of my hair and not just the top of it. it feels good on my scalp too. the wood grain in the brown handle is lovely too making it a pretty brush as well as very functional.

seems to be good shampoo and conditioner. the shampoo comes out of the bottle really dark blue but lathers up nice and white. it cleans my hair nicely, rinses out easily and has no strong or perfumed scent at all. i have been lightening my hair using home kits and prefer shampoos and creme rinses that help control any brassiness. the conditioner is a much lighter color and makes my hair feel great. it's easy to comb out and blow dry. however, it will leave your shower floor very slick so be careful with this stuff.

very good but pricey. this is a little jar of face cream for $27.98 (the price as of this review). it feels good on my facial skin, but honestly, it doesn't moisturize it any better than many less expensive creams i've used and reviewed. it's good, but i just don't see why it costs so much money. the texture is close to that of sour cream and it's easy to apply. it's a little greasy for a short while until it gets absorbed.

very good shampoo. i like this castor oil shampoo though i don't know how much castor oil it contains. castor oil is wonderful for hair and skin and i use a lot of it in my hand made soaps because it makes them very emollient and soothing to the skin. this is a huge bottle of shampoo and will last me a long time. it makes very good lather - nice and light and it rinses out well. my hair is very clean afterwards. i still use a good conditioner afterwards because my hair is a little damaged from being lightened. this shampoo has a very light scent too. there's nothing negative i can find to say about it.

medium gray and waterproof!. i have several of this type of eyebrow pencil but in a different shade. these are the kind that allow you to try make lines that look like hairs though i have never been really all that good at doing that. this is the first gray color eye brow pencil i've used and i like it pretty well. the gray color is medium - not dark or light, but right there in the middle. i use a very light touch and short strokes to get the color where i want it. i have scant eye brow hairs and have to fill in to make it look like i have full eyebrows. i like how this did, it seems to be waterproof and i really need waterproof because i play a lot of tennis and sweat a lot on the court under the hot sun in the deep south. i sweated a lot at practice last night and when i woke up this morning my eyebrows were still mostly there. i can't complain about that.

good bamboo brush with comb. i love bamboo brushes with bamboo bristles. they feel so good on my scalp - like a scalp massage when i brush my hair with them. this brush is really good, though i would have liked for the bristles pegs to be a little longer. i find i have to push the brush down harder to get to my scalp. i have another bamboo brush with longer bristles that i like best but this one is still a very good brush especially if you have short hair. the comb that comes with it is good for getting tangles out of thick hair and one of my kids has laid claim to it.

excellent product. i can't tell if my teeth are any whiter or not after using but i can tell that my sink and counter top are a lot darker. it's messy. but i still like it a lot. the powder is very fine and not coarse, and has no flavor. it think the activated charcoal is very good quality. i use activated charcoal a lot but not so much for brushing my teeth. i make handmade soaps and i like to make black soaps because they are so cool looking and clean the skin so well. i used some of this in some soap and it worked great! the toothbrush is good and so is the tongue scraper though i prefer a larger tongue scraper.

very good lip balm. i pretty much have chronically dry, chapped lips, especially in the winter. i'm frequently grabbing my lip glosses, balms, and anything greasy that i can put on them. i find that this pharmacopia tangerine-flavored lip balm is very soothing to my poor lips and really makes them feel so nicely moisturized. it goes on easily and is clear if i want to use some on the back of my dry hands when i can't find any lotion. i can't really taste any tangerine flavor, but the scent is definitely there and is very pleasant.

these work ok. these face lift tapes aren't bad as long as you don't get your hopes up that you will look 20 years younger. i'm nearly 62 and my facial skin is sagging - the reason for me selecting these face lift tapes when they appeared on my list of items i could review. your skin must be clean, dry and free of any moisturizers. they stick well to my skin and definitely pulls it up some. however, the skin that's pulled up gets crinkled up and if your hair doesn't cover it, the crinkles will show. the tapes are really hard to see once applied, and easy to apply once you get the hang of it. i blew through at least 10 just trying to figure it out but you get 40 in a box. again, these do work, and help eliminate some drooping skin, but they aren't a really good solution, imho.

organic argan oil??? i don't think so. i was really happy to receive this 4 oz. bottle of "organic moroccan argon oil" but it does not appear to be very organic nor pure argan oil. it's loaded with other chemicals, and perfume. upon opening the bottle i wondered why it had a scent, was clear and somewhat thin. i have several other brand of pure argan oil and it is thick, yellowish and has a musty/dirt-like scent. i can't give this livordo argan oil a high star rating since what it advertises doesn't seem to be what you get.

too rough for me to use. these are o.k. nail files, but i wouldn't use the gray side at all as it too rough. i would use the buff side to actually file my nails - if i wanted to use them. i find the thickness of the nail file a little hard to hold and will continue to use my wonderful slim glass nail file and super fine sandpaper to smooth the edges. i play and teach classical guitar and i need my nails to be just right to get good contact with the strings and these nail files leave my nails too rough on the edges. they are well packaged and colorful and would make a nice gift for someone who isn't as fussy as me about their nails.

good nail polish remover. i used this nail polish remover today to remove some nail polish that was 3 layers deep and hard dried. i first used a kleenex and it wasn't abrasive enough so i changed to a paper towel and was able to get the polish off faster. i really can't tell if this nail polish remover is any better than most other brands but it works well enough.

these will shave off facial hair just fine. i've never seen anything like these facial razors before so when they came up on my list of items i could review curiosity got the better of me. that said, they aren't bad. i'm at that age where i might spring an unwanted facial hair or two which i have to remove immediately upon detection. i used (carefully!) one of these small razors to try shaving just a small area of my face and it really did remove all the peach fuzz. i can't say that they are any better than a ladies electric facial shaver i've been using, but these would be a lot easier to carry in my purse just in case i needed to use one. they seem well made and one razor should last a long time. these are sharp, but kind of serrated at the edge so be careful with them.

good mask. this mask is very soft and molds itself around my bird beak nose pretty well. i can still detect the tiniest bit of light but it's a lot better than any of my other masks i have for blocking out light.

didn't do much for me. i've used this serum several times and i can't say i noticed any "tightening" or any smoothness occurring. it looks cool in the bottle being gold-ish with sparkles, but it did little to help my face feel moisturized. i have to go over it with a good moisturizer. the little beads rubbed in o.k. but again, nothing really happened.

gorgeous, lasting color!. i love the name - cinnamon roll! that's exactly what it looks like with a rich, glossy shine that isn't too tacky and stays on my lips for a long time. it applies smoothly with no clumping and i want to try other colors, it's so fun!

my favorite hair yet!. i absolutely love the colors in this hair, a mixture of honey, gold and auburn and i have received so many compliments on it. i am going to get more for sure! there is more than enough hair, eight packs for the crochet install and it is a great style for winter because it is warm too! the hair is thicker so it is also easy to remove and re-use if you want!

very pretty hair, looks awesome!. these crochet packs of hair are ready to use right out of the bag and are soft. the hair is of great quality with no tangling upon installation and looks even more perfect after sprayed with some oil sheen when done. i will definitely be using this hair again!

terrific value and quality.. argan oil has a distinct but subtle scent, and it is the first thing i look for when using it. this passes the smell test and feels wonderful when i apply it to my face and hair. because such a little goes a long way, it will last me some time and is a great buy.
works great!. it works really well, even in the dry and frigid winter air. non-greasy and moisture rich.

decent dupe. the product itself is decent.it reminds me of oil of olay. but it's about half the price has no scent. feels nice, light weight and hydrating. more of a daily use face creamhowever, this was a two pack and i was only sent one.
great primer at a great price. works great at plumping up my lashes before putting on my mascara
nice looking kit. nice looking kit. couldn't find in local stores so ordered on line. work great. more tools then you will ever need. some i don't even know what there for.

works best on normal nails not thick ones. this is a handy set of stainless podiatrist style nail trimmers and tools that come in a zippered storage case, making it convenient for travel or storage.the set includes one curved clipper, one angled one, a lifter for ingrown nails, a pusher for cuticle care, and two different files for smooth finishing. the angled main clipper has a non-adjustable internal tension spring and a coated ergonomic shaped hand grip, while the other clipper has a coated non-ergonomic shaped grip.when trying to cut through tough thick nails you need a sure grip. unfortunately, the grip coating material used on these clippers is hard and not padded, therefore failing to provide cushioning to users with arthritis or to provide a non-slip grip.i tried these clippers on my father's thick toenails, and they do cut, but not as sharply or precisely as the professional grade clippers i usually use on his nails. instead of one clean cut, it took several clips to get through his tough nails with these and because of that the finish was jagged and needed filing to smooth out.though i wouldn't recommend this set for seniors, i do think the curved shape of the larger clipper is a nice touch though, so they're useful enough for regular nails and handy to pack if you're planning a trip.

sturdy stainless pet comb. this stainless steel pet comb is well made and sturdy enough to detangle my maltese's long hair with ease. i've gotten it wet numerous times and upon air drying it hasn't shown any signs of rust, so the stainless appears to be of good quality. this comb is constructed well so it should last for years to come and i'm very satisfied with my purchase.
just love them. i love these brushes they have made my artwork even better than what it was the blending with these brushes is absolutely wonderful
eyeshadow crayons.. very cheaply made. the crayon keeps falling out. the colors are good. i am reminded that you get what you pay for
i love it. this drill is by far the best i've had yet...

you will need extra packs if you have a big head. i love this hair its very soft and the twist look very pretty but if you have a large head buy extra i had to buy and extra pack and i still didnt have enough for my whole head by the time i spent money on extra packs i spent almost $90 so for me the price was kind of high i never paid that much for synthetic hair i wish more twists came in each of the packs
underestimated difficulty. impossible to wear comfortably and the magnets should be spread out better for a more even or more realistic look because they are only on the ends.
breathe of fresh air!!. other than the actual piece being a little small on my face it def makes breathing much better. also, helps with fogging of glasses (if you wear them.)
almost nice. the original scent is pretty, but this particular batch is beyond shelf life.

love. love this stuff. we are the fairest of them all. irish ancestry through and through.pretty sure i had sun poisoning. this stuff was the only thing that saved me. its not sticky. it works immediately.we do our best to not burn but it does happen. and this stuff rocks. there's even some with added lidocaine. amazing.

it works!. honestly i was very skeptical about this product because it was on the cheaper side and the reviews were up and down. i figured what the heck its not to expensive take a chance. im so glad i did. i put it on my eye brows every night before bed and apply some to the tip of my finger and put it on my upper lashes where eyeliner would go. i would say it does take a few weeks to see a difference but be patient and apply it every night and you wont be disappointed. i get so many compliments on my eyelashes that people now think they are fake!! haha!

very pigmented. i discovered nyx white eye shadow a few years ago. i fell in love because it's very pigmented which is exactly what i like. i do a lot of bold looks. nothing else i've tried compares! i went to ulta beauty to buy more and that lady told me they completely stopped making the single pallet of white. i was so sad. come to find out they didn't. when i came across this i was so happy. might seem a little expensive for 1 tiny thing of it but all make up is expensive. this is definitely worth it if u like ur white eyeshadow to be just that. bright white!
try it. the case is big but it is what i need to store the dyson and to keep it protected

rusted and busted. i'm updating my review because the nail lamp plug has eroded and rusted, not even a month after purchasing. it is an electronic, so i obviously never let it get in contact with water. i wouldn't recommend this buy because of this issue.

these arent gel, like the written description says!. be aware the description says gel polish but they are not! the colors are not even the nice ones on the picture. they give you random colors, the unpopular ones for sure.
great buy. my daughter didn't want to take these out even though they were quite heavy due to the length! she got plenty of compliments everywhere she went. i definitely recommend them.
great value!. great value and sturdy combs. great use and i recommend them!

amazing. they are beautiful. the box is so cute it keeps everything in order. i would personally put them on before eye shadow that way the eyeliner will stick fully to your lid. you have to allow the eyeliner to dry fully. it doesnt take as long as the glue. i like to use the tips on my nail to press a little on the magnets they stick with no problem they dont lift. i love them. i definitely recommend and will buy again.

korean serum that delivers gentle hydration with ceramides and squalane. this skin & lab milky serum is lightweight and unscented. i like the texture and feel of this serum - not sticky nor greasy but offers immediate hydration. it leaves the skin feeling soft and well hydrated. the serum contains squalane and ceramides, providing moisture below the surface.

lavender scented body oil from australia. this body oil doesn't feel sticky or greasy on the skin. it hydrates but does leave a shine until the oil is absorbed. it has a light lavender and citrus scent.
light gel cleanser. this cica green cleanser comes in a gel form and is lightweight. it works well to remove layers of sunscreen without leaving my skin feeling stripped or overly dry.

works on combination sensitive skin. i'm new to the itfer brand but i like the way this essence magnifies the other skincare products that i use. the essence is light with a gel like texture. it has no scent and doesn't dry out my skin. i use several pumps and tap it on a newly cleansed face. it hydrates without causing any redness, irritation or sensitivity.after the essence, i use the itfer emulsion. the emulsion has a light citrus scent and shares the light gel texture. the emulsion is easily absorbed into the skin without a sticky or oily feel. it leaves the skin feeling hydrated.

works well on combination sensitive skin. the cell fusion c sheet masks offer generous amounts of serum and hydrate the skin. my skin feels soft, hydrated and pampered with regular use of these sheet masks.

light lavender water. this baby cologne is similar to lavender water in scent and feel. it comes in a plastic pump bottle and arrived in good condition. the baby cologne's scent dissipates fast but it smells and feels refreshing.

eye patches cool and reduce puffiness. these eye patches are comfortable to use and help reduce puffiness and swelling. they're a bit better than the travel packs since they feel more moist and seem to work longer.

hydrates well without any stickiness or greasiness. this face cream is more liquid than cream. it doesn't feel sticky or greasy on the skin and is absorbed quickly. it leaves my skin feeling very soft and hydrated. the cream does have a strong scent similar to tulips. i like the feel of the cream but not the scent.

gentle exfoliation on sensitive skin. amorepacific is a well known korean skincare brand and i've had very good experiences with the different high end lines of this company. enough project is a new "accessible" and less expensive line that uses clean beauty ingredients.the peeling pack goes on easily and crumbles as you rub it on your face. it exfoliates gently using plant extracts. i have combination sensitive skin and my skin is adjusting to the seasons changing. i was worried that the peeling pack would be too strong but i didn't experience any redness, sensitivity or irritation. instead my skin felt softer and receptive to moisturizer, essence, etc.

comfortable headbands. i find these cloth hairbands comfortable. i tried using them while jogging and they stayed in place and kept sweat from my face. the floral prints are pretty and ones that i'd choose again.

leaves scalp feeling clean, light and not dry. this hibiscus moisturizing scalp pack is used after shampooing. unlike a conditioner, the scalp pack focuses on the scalp and hydrates without feeling heavy or greasy. it leaves the scalp feeling clean, light and not dry.

works very well for me. these hair masks really helped my hair. they didn't leave my scalp or hair feeling greasy but they did leave my hair feeling soft and silky. i put my hair in a ponytail and then put on the cap with conditioner. the tape took some getting used to but once it was set up, the cap was comfortable. the conditioner/mask stayed in place and didn't drip. i kept it on longer than the 20 minutes and after rinsing, my hair felt so good.

natural wipes but expensive. the wipes have a strong lemon scent and use natural ingredients. the pack has 20 individually wrapped wipes that can be used on the skin or to clean in the home. they're not chemical disinfectant wipes, i mainly use them for my hands, etc and nearby surfaces when traveling because i enjoy the strong natural lemon scent. i have sensitive skin and they didn't cause any irritation or redness or sensitivity.

maximum exfoliation but takes some getting used to. these exfoliating mitts are strong but work well. they're korean style exfoliating mitts which are different from the usual drugstore type. they're made of lightweight material that dries quickly but shouldn't be put in the dryer. they are also much rougher than the regular ones and provide excellent if strong exfoliation. i usually use them on dry skin first and then wet them with shower gel for maximum effect. i rinse them out and airdry them. they help keep skin soft.

efficient packaging and excellent moisturizing essence. this 5-pack of shinsiaview vita essence are well packaged and easy to transport when traveling. i like the light cooling feel of the essence which is easily absorbed into the skin. it moisturizes without making my skin feel shiny or sticky. it left my skin feeling well hydrated and soft.i have combination sensitive skin and experienced no redness, sensitivity or irritation using this product.

thicker than other rubber masks and easier to peel off - but not as convenient as a sheet mask. these rubber masks do require more work and cause considerably more mess than the regular sheet masks.however, as far as rubber masks go, these are relatively easy to use and remove. the rubber mask stayed on thicker and were easier to peel off than some of the ones i'd used previously. the feel and texture of these masks light, cold and rubbery. once i remove the masks, my skin doesn't feel sticky at all. the masks hydrate and are light on the skin.

non-greasy lotion with hyaluronic acid. i always have lotion on hand so these individually packed tubes of lotion from south korea are a good fit for me. i like the feel and texture of the lotion - non greasy and effective. as a lotion, it is excellent but the scents are not particularly attractive. i've tried the olive and the green tea scented versions and am not particularly drawn to the scents. the green tea is a bit too sweet and doesn't smell like green tea, so i've deducted 1 star.

lightweight, non-greasy and hydrating hand lotion. this set has four individually packaged travel sized tubes of hand lotion from south korea. the lotion light, non-greasy and is quickly absorbed into the skin. while the scent is a little sweet for my taste, i love the feel and texture of the lotion. it doesn't have the lotion feel after a few minutes but my hands stay well hydrated and soft.

helps increase collagen and protect the skin barrier but feels very light on the skin. i'm always interested in trying new skincare products, brands, and innovations. i'm new to the ogana cell brand but knowing that the brand is created by a south korean dermatologist caught my attention. i have had very good experience with south korean skincare at different price points.this amazing lotion has a light texture, similar to a serum. i have combination sensitive skin and need anti-aging products. i found that this worked very well for me. there is a light fruity scent but the lotion doesn't feel sticky or oily and is quickly absorbed into the skin. it looks matte but hydrates well and left my skin feeling very soft. the lotion strengthens the skin barrier but doesn't have the slightly oily feel of many products that have the same purpose. i also like that the lotion helps to increase collagen -- at my age this makes a difference.

lovely texture and lavender scent. truly relaxing with its soothing lavender scent and natural oils! i use it after my shower and it makes my skin soft and well-nourished. this gives me a feeling of relaxation and being pampered. it is also smooth and very easy to apply.

rich, intense hydration. this murad hydration intense recovery cream doesn't have the usual cream texture, instead it is firm. but the cream is quick to soften when rubbed into the skin. it provides deep hydration and doesn't feel greasy or sticky. i find it particularly suited to the cold months when the indoor air is hot and dry. i have combination sensitive skin and this cream caused no redness, irritation or sensitivity.

deep hydration sheet mask. i always take time to pamper my skin, no matter how busy i am. thirty minutes is all it takes. whenever i use this avajar face mask, i feel calm and relaxed. above all, it provides deep hydration that soothes and is truly nourishing. i have sensitive combination skin and did not experience any redness or irritation or sensitivity.

six skincare items to layer on - works well on sensitive combination skin. i'm relatively new to the hanhoo brand. i'd previously tried their pimple patches and sheet masks but this $45 set is geared towards an older, more skincare oriented client. the packaging is giftable with six items for layering skin care (the english list of ingredients are on the plastic wrap). i found the products light and easily absorbed into the skin. i have sensitive combination skin and they worked well for me. they cleansed without stripping my skin and hydrated without being overly strong. i experienced no redness, sensitivity or irritation while using any of the products.

light sunscreen with a rose tint. i've liked the different alteya products that i'd tried but this rose face sunscreen doesn't work well for me. the texture is nice, light and doesn't feel greasy. it offers mineral protection against uva and uvb rays. i'm asian and find that the rose tint is a little strong for my skin tone. while i can use a little and blend it in, there are other tinted and non-tinted sunscreens that are a better fit for my needs. similarly, someone with a more compatible skintone might find this to be a perfect match.

luxurious body oil and fingernail moisturizer. i decided to pamper myself and enjoy the luxurious feel of this body oil and fingernail moisturizer. oh-la-la, this lotion is so soft and light, with a very subtle and fresh, clean smell. it hydrates the skin so well, using mainly organic material - plant & flower oils, some coming from the pacific islands.

lovely texture -- hydrates deeply. i am always interested in trying new skincare brands, products, and innovations. i'm new to the carla brand but have had very good experience with south korean skincare in the past. i loved this cream! it has a light scent and a lovely texture. the cream is not greasy or sticky but it hydrates deeply and well. i would definitely purchase this again and am interested in learning more other skincare items by carla

soothes and de-puffs the under eye area. i have good skin but the area under my eye tends to be puffy. i have started to use this product, applying these marine patches under my eyes and massaging the serum in afterwards to soothe and de-puff the area. i am very happy with the way they gently tighten my skin.

cleansing balm that works deeply and leaves skin soft. i'm always interested in trying new skincare products, brands, and innovations. mizon is a well regarded south korean skincare brand and its cleansing balm was gentle but effective. it comes solid in the jar with a small scoop that helps keep your fingers from touching the balm. after rubbing the balm together it turns liquid and goes on gently into the skin. i rubbed it further into my skin to help it cleanse deeply. the cleansing balm didn't feel greasy or sticky. i left it on for a few minutes and rinsed. my skin felt clean and very soft. it caused no irritation or sensitivity.

generous serum and deep hydration. this sheet mask felt lovely on the skin. the sheet mask is thick and generous with serum. the serum was gentle and did not cause any sensitivity or irritation. the mask itself hydrates deeply and stayed damp for over 20 minutes. it left my skin feeling soft and pampered.

gentle effective cleanser that targets sensitive skin. my skin has become more sensitive over time and the cold weather and dry air during winter exacerbates the condition. this easydew starter cleansing milk works very gently and is effective at cleaning. my skin doesn't feel stripped or dry and the ceramides increase hydration so that my skin feels soft after cleansing even without toner or moisturizer.i have sensitive skin and the cleanser did not cause redness or irritation or sensitivity.

dry oil with retinol. i've used retinol products, both otc and prescribed by my dermatologist. i've been careful to only use retinol at night and to avoid direct sunlight after using retinol. this serum does not specifically warn against going under direct sun, but it is worth taking the precaution.i liked the texture of the face oil retinol serum - it feels like a dry oil and is easily absorbed into the skin. it doesn't feel oily or sticky but it moisturizes. it helps improve the firmness and tone.i have sensitive skin and did not experience any redness, irritation, or sensitivity using this.

comforting scent, cleans without drying out my skin. i chose the baby powder scent which brings back memories of babies and childhood. my skin felt instantly clean and soft. it is made of natural nourishing ingredients and provides relief from dryness. the scent really brings comfort - i'm looking for that sort of soothing scents nowadays. the packaging is old fashioned with flower, lambs, etc.

caudalie's vinosource - a treat for the skin. i'm always interested in trying new skincare products, brands, and innovations. the caudalie products are among those often discussed by beauty bloggers and are prominent on "what skincare to buy when you visit france" lists. this set has their famous vinosource serum that contains the antioxidants from grape seeds. this vinosource serum smells lovely, is quickly absorbed into the skin, and hydrates deeply. it's a lightweight and effective serum that leaves my skin feeling pampered and very soft. it works very well during the dry cold months of autumn and winter.the cleanser is gentle but effective. the moisturizing cream has a lovely scent and the antioxidants that have made the brand famous. it is particularly welcome during the cold, dry months. i love that caudalie's products work so well. i have sensitive skin but these products have not caused me sensitivity or irritation or redness.the set is beautifully packaged and would be a lovely gift.

high quality hydrating ginseng sheet mask. i'm always happy to try new skincare products, brands, and innovations. i've used sheet masks for years and am familiar with the benefits of ginseng but these masks use ginseng topically.the sheet masks are thick, generous with serum, and hydrate without feeling sticky. i liked the feel of the sheetmask and that it didn't have any additional material or cover sheet. the mask hydrates and is relaxing. the instructions suggest using the mask for 20 min but i wore it for 75 min without it drying out.i have sensitive skin but experienced no redness, irritation, or sensitivity.

soothing and hydrating sheet masks. i'm always interested in trying different skincare innovations. products and brands. i've been using different sheet masks for years and find them effective at pampering my skin.i hadn't tried this brand koec before but was very happy with the quality of the cucumber essence masks. they are individually packed and i prefer to cool them in the fridge before using. the mask is very soft and holds moisture well. it also has plenty of serum and the mask lasted for over 20 minutes without drying.the cucumber essence is soothing and hydrating. it left my skin feeling very soft without feeling sticky. i have sensitive skin and experienced no redness, sensitivity or irritation using this product.

slowly absorbed into the skin. i am always interested in trying new skincare innovations, products and brands. i am new to the laloirelle brand and was intrigued by the description of this luminous face oil. i'd used different face oils in the past with varying success. i have oily skin in parts (t zone) and sensitive skin.this luminous face oil combines several high quality antioxidants to help moisten and brighten the skin. i found the face oil was not quickly absorbed into the skin. i would prefer to use this at night because of the time it takes for the oil to be absorbed. i did wake up with well hydrated skin. considering the high cost of this face oil, i had expected it to standout. i may have to use it for an extended time before i feel or see results.i did not experience any redness, irritation or sensitivity.

deep hydration but matte look. i'm always interested in trying new skincare innovations, products and brands. i'm new to follain and find this mattifying moisturizer to be effective and high quality. the moisturizer is a little thick and hydrates deeply without feeling greasy or oily at all. it does take a while for all of the moisturizer to be fully absorbed but it leaves my face feeling very soft and hydrated.i have sensitive skin but noticed no sensitivity, redness or irritation.

facial oil with resveratrol. this lipid facial oil comes quite pricey at $70 but it also gives you a large portion of 60 ml or 2 oz. most of my serums come in 1 oz bottles, so while $70 is high it is not outrageous.the facial oil is made in the usa and contains resveratrol which helps combat aging. resveratrol comes from grapes and has strong antioxidants. this essential lipid power infusion also contains argan oil, rose hip oil, and a mix of extracts.i found this essential lipid power infusion to stay on my skin for a relatively long time. it left my skin feeling a bit greasy but once absorbed it felt very soft and well hydrated. i agree with the other reviewers that recommend using this in the evening because of the time that it takes for the oil to be absorbed.

immediately soothing and caused no redness or irritation. i have found my skin has become more sensitive in my 40s and with all the additional washing and bathing because of covid 19. i'm new to this brand but found this cica cream to work very well. it immediately cooled and soothed my irritated skin without any greasiness or oiliness. it was quickly absorbed into the skin. it left my skin feeling much softer, less irritated, soothed. it is something i plan to keep on hand.

a little goes a long way. i use a pea-sized portion which i mix until it froths. i apply the foam to my face and let it stand briefly before rinsing it off. it leaves my skin feeling deep cleansed but not squeaky dry. i have not had any sensitivity or redness or irritation. it works well with my regular toner and serum.

light cream with glycolic acid, vitamin c and ginseng extract. this cream hydrates but feels very light on the skin. it has glycolic acid helps exfoliate without causing me any redness or sensitivity or irritation. i like the texture and the light citrus scent.

inexpensive stone roller. my quartz roller worked well. i washed it carefully first and then used the larger roller for my forehead, cheeks and chin. the smaller roller worked well under my eyes. i liked the feel of the rollers as they massaged my face. they did make a slight squeaky sound but they held up well. it is similar to a face massage but very easy to do while relaxing at home. at this price, it is a reasonble buy.
if it would cut on more than 50% of the time. it's ok as sometimes it doesn't turn on and you have to keep messing w it. the light always comes on, just not the motor.
very happy with my purchase. i haven't tried the rhinestones bands yet. i love the designs on the fabric bands. the bands fit great nice quality and wasn't tight i can't wait to wear the others.
great jars!. great jars for cosmetics such as body butters.

watch sizes vs $. love this scent even with my allergies i'm okay. i only use clear gel. watch sizes vs price of deodorants through amazon this is not the only brand i have found you think you are getting good price vs store but they are smaller.
not silk. not silk and its cheap material that tears
works amazing!. this worked perfectly for my 4c hair and made wash day so much easier!
works great. silicone is nice and soft and definitely gets those hard to reach places
good quality hair. good quality hair looks gorgeous on my daughter. she just loves the easy to care of soft and silky curls.

to flimsy- needs to be a little sturdier. extremely flimsy, not easy to get through the hair and my daughter doesnt have thick hair. rather disappointing we have tried 3 times and they bend incorrectly and the hair comes out. whaaaawhawhaa
worth the money, and some. very tasty and fun too might i add. it is a little messy if mixed with body fluids and will stain hotel sheet lol so use wisely. i highly recommend!!

my opinion. nice earrings, great for price considering you get 3 pair. only problem is gages are bigger than normal piercing earrings from like walmart or claires. they are nearly twice (2) the size so i do not really recommend for young children. it tends to be uncomfortable. i actually removed from my cartilage (pierced 17yrs.) due to discomfort
perfect. these brushes are perfect for design, even some for joe application. good price and good quality
three stars. love it just wish it was silk or polyester
wash it so it can last & smell wonderful. love the color & it detangles my hair
wash by hand & cold water. love love love this bonnet . the material is excellent, keeps your hair style intact, silky on the inside, go for it!!
first time using these. i love these! its my first time using these sponges and i love them! and they're easy to clean
love love them. i bought them for my self so glad i did. i believe a new make up teen should use a different kind.
love this spray!!. love this spray and has a natural hold.
a very good conditioner. i love the way it detangles my hair and the strength it gives it.

a feminine, flirty look for less than a professional cut and color!. this style is very youthful and the coloring just right for me. the cap is very lightweight and easy to adjust. the wig comes with a net to wear over your own hair. i recommend wearing it so the wig has a base to grip on to. i also bought the wig brush and comb recommended with the purchase. i am very satisfied! no more bad hair day worries!
love these towels. these towels are awesome. they exfoliate and clean your body/skin like no other. excellent quality and they last forever. you will never use a washcloth again

like mini sized. when i first got it i was shocked at how small the bottle was! like mini sized. i felt ripped off. but then i got around to using it and i really like it. the color changing is cool. pink when it's warm and orange when it's cool, red when cold.
read. didn't realize it was only 2 inches wide. need 3 inches. gave too my granddaughter she loves them. have to may attention and read everything before i order.
burns like my latex allergy. sensitive skin? beware of lume! i haven't used it in a week and i am still hurting from when i did use it.
must have.. its a little light so be careful not to knock it over; maybe glue some weights on the underside? other than that, its a great product and a great price to match that.

did strip some color off of brand new boots. adds no shine to smooth leather.. used this on two pairs of boots. took some of the color off of a brand new pie of brandy-colored smooth leather. managed to not add any shine to the smooth leather, which is good. refreshed my old pair of work steel toes.
beautiful color. love this color! its beautiful on. perfect mild mustard.

a perfect dupe for the boom stick. feel it is a great dupe for the overpriced boom stick. i have enjoyed using it. it adds the glow or frost if you will, but is not heavily frosty and does not have any glitter. it is perfect for older women's wrinkled eyes. i would definitely purchase this product again.
bit tight. a bit tight and i have a smaller head than some lol

honeysuckle shave soap.. this stuff is excellent. the smell is absolutely amazing. this takes me back to my childhood and the honeysuckle in our back yard. while i wouldn't want to smell like this all day since it isn't very masculine, it is great to enjoy while i shave. the soap is slick and performs great. this is a top notch product.

just got an amazing shave!. i have about 10 razors. i have been in search of better and better shaves. my feather as-d2 is awesome and smooth but perhaps a bit too mild. i fine even the merkur 34c a little too aggressive for my skin. the merkur futur is horrible for me and is a paperweight for anyone who prefers mild razors. the ikon b1 slant is a perfect balance. not too aggressive, and with a light touch it gave me a very smooth shave. i normally do 3 passes and then touch up areas that need it. i had 5 days growth when i shaved with this razor head today. i was amazed when i finished my first pass. it looked like i had done two passes with my other razors. i normally do with the grain, cross-grain, and then lightly against the grain.with the b1 i did a with-the-grain pass and one very light across-the-grain pass and it looked like i was done shaving. i did a touch-up in one or two spots and i called it good. an against the grain pass would have left me absolutely bbs but that usually gives me ingrown hairs. oh, by the way, no nicks, weepers, or irritation at all. the head is shaped very weird with the slant design but i was able to shave under my nostrils with ease; much better than most, actually! i really am impressed with this head.i can't wait to do another shave tomorrow.my shave:ikon b1 headikon oss handle from my 101persona lab blue blade (2nd shave on the blade)stirling soap co. british leather shaving soapstirling soap co. coniferous pre-shave oil

underwhelming product. this product is not suitable as highlighter if one is very pale. also, the finish is not natural but glittery/shimmery bordering chunky. the bronzer will cling to any areas of the skin where one has peach fuzz/tiny hairs thus making the application process a pain.

wishful thinking to hope this product might work -- but no.. i wish i could give this more stars. i wish that it helped me grow long, thick, lush eyelashes. but that is not the case. there is very, very, very little product in the tube -- and it is extremely difficult to apply using the brush provided, particularly given the caution that you need to avoid touching skin when applying the product. this might work for someone, but it certainly did not work for me.

a little pricy, but worth it -- the color and design are beautiful, and the barrette is great for thick hair. i don't know why made in france barrette fixings are so superior to anything made in the united states -- they certainly look the same and mechanically, they function the same, but for some reason, the french barrettes are just a whole lot better. they don't pull or catch my hair, they don't stretch out of shape, they don't break and bend. i know this is a lot of $$ to spend on a barrette when you can get one for a fraction of this price at your corner drug store, but these france luxe barrettes are worth it. this coral colored scallop design is beautiful, and the barrette hold a lot of hair. this is definitely for thick hair. france luxe also makes boule style barrettes for fine hair -- so if you don't have a thick mop, i would check out the other france luxe designs. these are expensive for what they are, but they're beautiful and long-lasting. and they work, always important in a barrette. i can put this barrette in my hair and it stays put all day.
helps. it does help in lubricating the blades and getting a smoother shave.

great. after trying out a philips (norelco) 7120 to see if i could escape the wet razor trap i was ready for the next step; that model worked fine, except that by design the battery doesn't last that long and i could seldom get an acceptable shave around the neck. the 1050x solves both problems, i can shave in less time (must be the blades it uses) and it charges very quickly (one hour, with a quick charge for emergencies).it comes with a travel "sarcophagus" (which i find a nice detail) which can also be used to charge the razor, and a charging stand; the hair deposit chambers for each blade do fill quickly, particularly with anything older than a day old stubble for me, and a sign comes up asking you to empty them - which is done quickly and easily enough.the only negatives are that it's quite a bit noisier than the 7120, but then again that is quite quiet... i still cannot get the best shave over the area between my mouth and my chin... but then again we all different facial features... and it's pricey... i'm still kicking myself for not buying this when it came out as a special deal... but i needed it too much to wait for another one to show up.
used to make diy stevia glycerite. i used some of this to make diy stevia glycerite. it worked. this is a lot of pure glycerin, glad i've got it; hard to find in a store.

highly recommend, however shipment took a little long to arrive. i do not know where it is shipped from.. this is a fabulous drink of moisture and youth for my skin. i'm using about once a week. i love how my skin looks and feels.

excellent product and great followup!. just started using this, but i am very impressed. i had some issues on my scalp that i've bee trying to clear up for years, (yes years!). i dropped this castor oil on the spots at night with a q-tip. the problem has completely gone away. thank you!

unbelievable price. got this kit on sale for under $20, which is an absolute steal! i guess tobs discontinued the scent, so the supplier was clearing out inventory.it's a cologne-type scent with a modern vibe. the shave cream performs like other tobs shave creams, which is a good thing. easy to build a lather, reasonably slick and protective. the cream is harder than other tobs creams i've used, but that doesn't affect performance in the least.the kit also comes with a badger brush and a cologne. the brush is actually pretty good! it's black badger hair, so the bristles are relatively stiff/scritchy, but i prefer that. had the typical badger funk for the first few shaves, but now it's neutral. no lost bristles yet, so it seems like a quality brush/knot.the cologne is also nice, a matching scent to the shave cream. i find that it lasts 2-3 hours on my skin. it's a good office/professional scent: pleasant, inoffensive. probably not going to turn any heads.no matter how you slice it, $20 for this kit is a great value!
wonderfull add-on for curly haired peoplr.. worked great. just like the one in the salon where i go.it really increases the curliness of my hair.
very good product. this product comes with a brow razor and stencils for filling in eyebrows. the color chestnut is good for brown browns & it goes on nicely without being too heavy a color.
